papers.title: Engineered conductive pili enable high-efficiency photosynthetic electron extraction in biophotovoltaics.
papers.abstract: The efficient extraction of electrons from photosynthetic microorganisms remains a critical challenge in living biophotovoltaics (BPV). While nanomaterials can facilitate electron transport, their stochastic adsorption leads to inefficient material-wasteful interfaces. Here, we demonstrate a controllable approach to direct the targeted assembly of gold nanoparticles (AuNPs) onto the type IV pili of Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803 by using a genetically encoded gold-binding peptide. This approach creates a spatially precise conductive nano-bio interface on the cell envelope that serves as a dedicated electron conduit between photosynthetic electron transport chains (PETCs) and electrodes. This nano-bio interface enhances electron transfer through synergistic improvements in interfacial charge transfer and biofilm density, ultimately yielding a four-fold increase in photocurrent density, while using two orders of magnitude less gold than non-targeted strategies. Moreover, the AuNPs can be transferred from inactivated to fresh cells, indicating a potential pathway for long-term stability. This work establishes a generalizable strategy for the rational design of conductive interfaces on living cells, with implications for biophotovoltaics, microbial electrosynthesis, and next-generation biohybrid devices.
papers.abstract_zh: 从光合微生物中高效提取电子仍然是活体生物光伏（BPV）领域的一项关键挑战。虽然纳米材料可以促进电子传输，但其随机吸附形成的界面效率低下且浪费材料。本研究展示了一种可控策略，利用基因编码的金结合肽将金纳米颗粒（AuNPs）靶向组装到集胞藻（Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803）的IV型菌毛（type IV pili）上。该方法在细胞包膜上创建了空间精确的导电纳米生物界面，作为光合电子传递链（PETCs）与电极之间的专用电子通道。该界面通过协同改善界面电荷转移和生物膜密度来增强电子传递，最终使光电流密度提高四倍，同时金用量比非靶向策略降低两个数量级。此外，AuNPs可从失活细胞转移至新鲜细胞，为长期稳定性提供了潜在途径。这项工作为活细胞导电界面的理性设计建立了一种通用策略，对生物光伏、微生物电合成和下一代生物混合装置具有重要意义。
key_findings: 利用基因编码金结合肽将金纳米颗粒（AuNPs）靶向组装于IV型菌毛，构建精准导电纳米生物界面
该界面协同增强界面电荷转移与生物膜密度，使光电流密度提升4倍，金用量降低两个数量级
AuNPs可从失活细胞转移至新鲜细胞实现再利用，为生物光伏系统长期稳定性提供潜在途径

papers.title: Dango: Predicting higher-order genetic interactions.
papers.abstract: Higher-order genetic interactions have profound implications for understanding the molecular mechanisms of phenotypic variation, yet they remain poorly characterized. Most studies focus on pairwise interactions because high-throughput screens over the vast combinatorial space are challenging. Here, we develop Dango, a computational method based on a self-attention hypergraph neural network, to predict higher-order genetic interactions among groups of genes. As a proof of concept, we provide predictions for over 400 million trigenic interactions in the yeast S. cerevisiae, greatly expanding their quantitative landscape. Dango accurately predicts trigenic interactions and reveals biological functions related to cell growth. We further incorporate protein embeddings and uncertainty estimation to improve biological relevance and interpretability. Moreover, predicted interactions serve as genetic markers for growth responses across diverse conditions. Together, Dango enables a more complete map of complex genetic interactions that shape phenotypic diversity. A record of this paper's transparent peer review process is included in the supplemental information.
papers.abstract_zh: 高阶遗传相互作用对理解表型变异的分子机制具有深远意义，但目前仍缺乏深入表征。由于高通量筛选面临巨大的组合空间挑战，大多数研究仅关注成对相互作用。本研究开发了Dango——一种基于自注意力超图神经网络（self-attention hypergraph neural network）的计算方法，用于预测基因群组间的高阶遗传相互作用。作为概念验证，我们为酿酒酵母（S. cerevisiae）提供了超过4亿个三基因相互作用（trigenic interactions）的预测，大幅扩展了其定量图谱。Dango能够准确预测三基因相互作用并揭示与细胞生长相关的生物学功能。我们进一步整合蛋白质嵌入（protein embeddings）和不确定性估计（uncertainty estimation）以提升生物学相关性与可解释性。此外，预测的相互作用可作为不同条件下生长反应的遗传标记。总之，Dango为绘制塑造表型多样性的复杂遗传相互作用完整图谱提供了有力工具。
key_findings: 开发基于自注意力超图神经网络的Dango方法，实现高阶遗传相互作用精准预测
预测逾4亿个酿酒酵母三基因相互作用，极大拓展定量遗传相互作用图谱
整合蛋白质嵌入与不确定性估计，揭示细胞生长机制并作为跨条件遗传标记

papers.title: Engineered commensals for metabolic modulation of the gut-liver-brain axis.
papers.abstract: The gut-liver-brain axis is central to metabolic and neurological homeostasis and is mediated by host- and microbiota-derived metabolites. Disruptions in this axis contribute to complex disorders, underscoring the need for targeted, multi-metabolite interventions. Here, we engineered commensal Lactobacillus plantarum WCFS1 strains to specifically modulate metabolites dysregulated in hepatic encephalopathy (HE), a disorder driven by hyperammonemia and amino acid imbalance. One strain couples ammonia assimilation with branched-chain amino acid (BCAA) biosynthesis, whereas the other enhances L-glutamine utilization to suppress ammonia generation. In two preclinical HE models, these strains reduced systemic ammonia by up to 10-fold, restored BCAA and L-glutamine balance, and improved anxiety-like and cognitive behaviors. Notably, they outperformed rifaximin, a clinically used HE therapy, while preserving gut microbiota diversity. These findings establish engineered commensals as a modular, responsive platform for multi-metabolite modulation of host-microbiota metabolism, offering a programmable strategy to restore metabolic homeostasis in disorders of the gut-liver-brain axis.
papers.abstract_zh: 肠-肝-脑轴是代谢和神经稳态的核心，由宿主和微生物群来源的代谢物介导。该轴的破坏会导致复杂疾病，凸显了靶向性多代谢物干预的必要性。本研究构建了工程化共生菌——植物乳杆菌（Lactobacillus plantarum）WCFS1 菌株，用于特异性调控肝性脑病（hepatic encephalopathy, HE）中失调的代谢物；HE 是一种由高氨血症和氨基酸失衡驱动的疾病。其中一个菌株将氨同化与支链氨基酸（branched-chain amino acid, BCAA）生物合成相偶联，另一个则增强 L-谷氨酰胺的利用以抑制氨生成。在两种临床前 HE 模型中，这些菌株将系统氨水平降低多达 10 倍，恢复了 BCAA 和 L-谷氨氨酸的平衡，并改善了焦虑样和认知行为。值得注意的是，它们优于临床使用的 HE 治疗药物利福昔明（rifaximin），同时保留了肠道微生物群的多样性。这些发现确立了工程化共生菌作为一种模块化、响应性的平台，用于多代谢物调控宿主-微生物群代谢，为恢复肠-肝-脑轴疾病中的代谢稳态提供了一种可编程的策略。
key_findings: 构建两种工程化植物乳杆菌，分别通过氨同化偶联BCAA合成及增强L-谷氨酰胺利用来纠正肝性脑病代谢紊乱。
在临床前模型中降低系统氨水平达10倍，恢复BCAA与谷氨酰胺平衡，改善焦虑与认知行为，疗效优于利福昔明。
建立工程化共生菌作为模块化、响应性平台，实现宿主-微生物群代谢的多重调控，为肠-肝-脑轴疾病提供可编程治疗策略。

papers.title: Condensation-independent intramodular translocation mechanism of the trans-AT polyketide synthase assembly line.
papers.abstract: Decarboxylative condensation drives chain elongation and translocation of polyketides and fatty acids. However, the mechanism by which nonelongating modules in trans-acyltransferase polyketide synthases (trans-AT PKSs) enable intramodular polyketide chain translocation without decarboxylation remains poorly understood. Here we elucidate a condensation-independent intramodular translocation mechanism in which KS0 within the nonelongating module operates as a transacylase, directly translocating the polyketide chain to its downstream cognate acyl carrier protein (ACP). Notably, the inherent demalonylation activity of trans-ATHtmA7 facilitates efficient ACP recycling ensuring intramodular translocation. Structural modeling and site-directed mutagenesis studies uncover a conserved KS0-ACP binding mode that underpins intramodular translocation across diverse nonelongating modules. Additionally, the strict discrimination of polyketide intermediate by the nonelongating module highlights its critical role in maintaining biosynthetic precision and efficiency. These findings provide mechanistic insights into evolutionary adaptation and sophisticated crosstalk between catalytic domains within trans-AT PKS, illuminating how metabolic flux and fidelity are maintained and opening avenues for polyketide engineering.
papers.abstract_zh: 脱羧缩合（decarboxylative condensation）驱动聚酮和脂肪酸的链延伸与转移。然而，反式酰基转移酶聚酮合酶（trans-AT PKSs）中非延伸模块如何在不发生脱羧的情况下实现模块内聚酮链转移的机制尚不清楚。本研究阐明了一种不依赖缩合的模块内转移机制：非延伸模块中的KS0作为转酰酶（transacylase），直接将聚酮链转移至其下游同源的酰基载体蛋白（ACP）。值得注意的是，trans-ATHtmA7固有的去丙二酰化（demalonylation）活性促进了ACP的高效循环，确保了模块内转移。结构建模和定点突变研究揭示了保守的KS0-ACP结合模式，该模式支撑了不同非延伸模块中的模块内转移。此外，非延伸模块对聚酮中间体的严格识别突显了其在维持生物合成精确性和效率中的关键作用。这些发现为trans-AT PKS中的进化适应以及催化结构域间的精细互作提供了机制性见解，阐明了代谢通量（metabolic flux）和保真度如何被维持，并为聚酮工程开辟了新途径。
key_findings: 发现非延伸模块中KS0作为转酰酶直接转移聚酮链至下游ACP，不依赖脱羧缩合反应
trans-ATHtmA7的去丙二酰化活性促进ACP循环，确保模块内聚酮链高效转移
揭示保守KS0-ACP结合模式及非延伸模块对中间体的严格识别，维持生物合成保真度

papers.title: PinkyCaMP: an mScarlet-based calcium sensor with enhanced brightness, photostability and multiplexing capabilities.
papers.abstract: Genetically encoded calcium (Ca2+) indicators (GECIs) are essential tools for monitoring neuronal activity, but the performance of red fluorescent GECIs has remained limited. In particular, many red indicators are relatively dim, produce low signal-to-noise ratios and can undergo unwanted photoswitching when exposed to blue light, restricting their use in all-optical experiments that combine imaging with optogenetics or multicolor imaging. Here we show the development of PinkyCaMP, a Ca2+ sensor based on the bright red fluorescent protein mScarlet. PinkyCaMP exhibits markedly improved brightness, photostability and signal-to-noise ratio compared to existing red GECIs, while remaining fully compatible with blue-light-based optogenetic and dual-color imaging approaches. PinkyCaMP is well-tolerated by neurons, showing no detectable toxicity or aggregation, both in vitro and in vivo. PinkyCaMP enables a broad spectrum of imaging modalities, including single-photon methods, such as fiber photometry, widefield imaging and miniature microscopy imaging, as well as two-photon imaging in awake mice.
papers.abstract_zh: 基因编码钙离子（Ca²⁺）指示剂（GECIs）是监测神经元活动的重要工具，但红色荧光 GECIs 的性能一直受限。特别是，许多红色指示剂相对较暗、信噪比较低，且在暴露于蓝光时会发生非期望的光开关现象，这限制了它们在结合成像与光遗传学或多色成像的全光学实验中的应用。本研究开发了一种基于高亮度红色荧光蛋白 mScarlet 的 Ca²⁺ 传感器 PinkyCaMP。与现有红色 GECIs 相比，PinkyCaMP 表现出显著改善的亮度、光稳定性和信噪比，同时与基于蓝光的光遗传学及双色成像方法完全兼容。PinkyCaMP 被神经元良好耐受，在体外和体内均显示出无可检测的毒性或聚集现象。PinkyCaMP 支持广泛的成像模态，包括单光子方法（如光纤光度法、宽场成像和微型显微镜成像），以及清醒小鼠的双光子成像。
key_findings: 基于 mScarlet 开发了新型红色钙传感器 PinkyCaMP，亮度、光稳定性和信噪比较现有工具显著提升
消除了蓝光诱导的非期望光开关，实现了与光遗传学及双色成像的完全兼容
在体外和体内均显示无毒性或聚集，支持从单光子到双光子的多种成像模态

papers.title: A combinatorial domain screening platform reveals epigenetic effector interactions for transcriptional perturbation.
papers.abstract: Epigenetic regulation involves the coordinated interplay of diverse proteins. To systematically explore these combinations, we present COMBINE (combinatorial interaction exploration), a high-throughput platform that tests over 50,000 pairs of epigenetic effector domains up to 2,094 amino acids in length for their ability to modulate endogenous human gene transcription. COMBINE reveals diverse synergistic interactions between epigenetic protein domains, including a potent KRAB-L3MBTL3 fusion that increases the effective targeting window, enhances gene silencing in dose-limited conditions, and enables robust dual-directional CRISPR perturbation. Inducible screening shows DNA methylation modifiers are essential for epigenetic memory, with distinct combinations driving long-term repression and activation. This systematic analysis of pairwise domain interactions advances our understanding of epigenetic crosstalks and the development of next-generation epigenome editing tools. More broadly, COMBINE offers a generalizable platform to functionally characterize combinatorial biological processes at scale.
papers.abstract_zh: 表观遗传调控涉及多种蛋白质的协调互作。为系统探索这些组合，我们开发了COMBINE（组合互作探索）高通量平台，测试了超过50,000对表观遗传效应结构域（长达2,094个氨基酸）对内源性人类基因转录的调控能力。COMBINE揭示了表观遗传蛋白结构域间多样的协同相互作用，包括一种强效的KRAB-L3MBTL3融合蛋白，其可扩大有效靶向窗口、增强剂量受限条件下的基因沉默，并实现稳健的双向CRISPR扰动。诱导性筛选显示DNA甲基化修饰因子对表观遗传记忆至关重要，不同组合分别驱动长期抑制与激活。这项对成对结构域互作的系统性分析推进了我们对表观遗传串扰的理解及下一代表观基因组编辑工具的开发。更广泛地，COMBINE为大规模功能表征组合生物学过程提供了一个可推广的平台。
key_findings: 开发了COMBINE高通量平台，可测试5万余对表观遗传效应结构域对内源基因转录的调控作用
发现KRAB-L3MBTL3融合蛋白可扩展靶向窗口并增强剂量受限条件下的基因沉默效率
揭示DNA甲基化修饰因子通过特定组合分别驱动表观遗传记忆的长期抑制与激活

papers.title: Intrinsic edge dislocations promote high-temperature strength and ductility in additively manufactured refractory high-entropy alloys.
papers.abstract: Refractory high-entropy alloys (RHEAs) hold promise for applications in extreme environments. However, conventional as-cast RHEAs are constrained by the trade-off between strength and ductility, necessitating time- and energy-intensive post-processing. Here, we propose a streamlined strategy to fabricate RHEAs via laser directed energy deposition (LDED) using elemental powder blends, eliminating the need for post heat treatments. The additively manufactured (AMed) Nb40Ta25Ti15Hf15Zr5 alloy, characterized by a high density of intrinsic edge dislocations introduced during the thermal cycling of the process, demonstrates a remarkable tensile strength of ~497.3 MPa and a uniform elongation of ~6.8 % at 1000 °C, representing a ~ 37.8% and ~61.9% increase, respectively, over its as-cast counterparts. It is found that the intrinsic edge dislocations generated during AM process significantly enhances the alloy's strain hardening capability at elevated temperatures. Simultaneously, the high density of edge dislocations effectively enhance material deformability through kink band formation and the stochastic nature of dislocation motion. This work presents a cost-effective pathway for the rapid fabrication of AMed RHEAs with an exceptional combination of high-temperature strength and ductility, paving the way for next-generation structural alloys in extreme environments.
papers.abstract_zh: 难熔高熵合金(RHEAs)在极端环境应用中具有广阔前景。然而，传统铸态RHEAs受限于强度与延展性的权衡，需要耗时耗能的后处理。本研究提出一种简化策略，通过激光定向能量沉积(LDED)利用元素粉末混合物直接制备RHEAs，无需后续热处理。增材制造(AM)的Nb40Ta25Ti15Hf15Zr5合金在工艺热循环过程中引入了高密度内在刃位错，在1000°C下展现出约497.3 MPa的拉伸强度和约6.8%的均匀延伸率，较铸态合金分别提升约37.8%和61.9%。研究发现，增材制造过程中产生的内在刃位错显著增强了合金在高温下的应变硬化能力。同时，高密度刃位错通过扭折带形成及位错运动的随机性有效提升了材料变形能力。本工作为快速制备兼具高温强度与延展性的增材制造RHEAs提供了一条经济高效的途径，为下一代极端环境结构合金的发展铺平了道路。
key_findings: 采用激光定向能量沉积工艺制备的Nb40Ta25Ti15Hf15Zr5合金在1000°C下展现出优异的高温强度和延展性，性能远超铸态合金
增材制造热循环过程中引入的高密度内在刃位错显著提升了合金在高温环境下的应变硬化能力
刃位错通过形成扭折带和随机位错运动机制有效增强了材料在高温条件下的变形能力

papers.title: CRISPRi-based functional genomic screening identifies genes essential for CH4-dependent growth in a methanotrophic bacterium.
papers.abstract: Methanotrophic bacteria are the primary organisms that consume atmospheric methane (CH4) and have potential to mitigate climate-active gases. However, a limited understanding of the genetic determinants of methanotrophy hinders the development of biotechnologies leveraging these unique microbes. Here, we developed and optimized a CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) system to enable functional genomic screening in methanotrophic bacteria. We built a genome-wide single guide RNA (sgRNA) library in the industrial methanotroph, Methylococcus capsulatus, consisting of ~45,000 unique sgRNAs mediating inducible, CRISPRi-dependent transcriptional repression. A selective screen during growth on CH4 identified genes associated with essential methanotrophic bacterial processes and previously unidentified essential gene candidates, highlighting the utility of CRISPRi for functional genetic screening in methanotrophs. The CRISPRi screen also led to nitrate mineral salts medium optimization to improve methanotroph biomass productivity from CH4. Collectively, our results show that the CRISPRi system and sgRNA library developed here can be used for facile gene-function analyses and genomic screening to identify genetic determinants of methanotrophy and isolation of improved methanotroph biocatalysts.
papers.abstract_zh: 甲烷氧化细菌是消耗大气甲烷（CH4）的主要生物，具有缓解气候活性气体的潜力。然而，对甲烷氧化遗传决定因素的认识有限，阻碍了利用这些独特微生物的生物技术发展。本研究开发并优化了CRISPR干扰（CRISPRi）系统，以在甲烷氧化细菌中实现功能基因组筛选。我们在工业甲烷氧化菌Methylococcus capsulatus中构建了一个全基因组单向导RNA（sgRNA）文库，包含约45,000个独特的sgRNA，可介导可诱导的、依赖CRISPRi的转录抑制。在CH4生长条件下进行的选择性筛选鉴定出与甲烷氧化细菌必需过程相关的基因以及此前未鉴定的必需基因候选物，突显了CRISPRi在甲烷氧化菌功能遗传筛选中的实用性。该CRISPRi筛选还促进了硝酸盐矿物盐培养基的优化，提高了甲烷氧化菌以甲烷为底物的生物量产率。综上所述，本研究开发的CRISPRi系统和sgRNA文库可用于便捷的基因功能分析和基因组筛选，以鉴定甲烷氧化的遗传决定因素并分离改良的甲烷氧化菌生物催化剂。
key_findings: 在工业甲烷氧化菌Methylococcus capsulatus中建立了包含约45,000个sgRNA的全基因组CRISPRi筛选平台。
通过甲烷依赖性生长筛选，鉴定出甲烷氧化关键必需基因及此前未识别的新候选基因。
基于筛选结果优化硝酸盐矿物盐培养基，显著提高了甲烷氧化菌以甲烷为底物的生物量产率。

papers.title: Automating population construction and parallel simulation of biophysical models for neuromuscular cells: An inverse approach.
papers.abstract: Biophysical modeling and simulation help to promote a comprehensive understanding of the neuromuscular mechanisms underlying muscle force generation and control in normal and pathological states. However, this process is labor intensive and limited to special conditions due to the heterogeneity of neuromuscular cells and the variability in their organization across body parts and ages. We present a methodology to resolve this issue. First, we formulate a building-block approach with an inverse modeling framework for automated population construction and tractable hierarchical analysis under various physiological conditions. Second, we devise a network folder-based approach with a virtual environment technique for efficient parallel simulation that can operate on a multicore computer, a supercomputing system, or a computer network through the internet. Third, we implement the methodology by developing open-source command-line software called pNMS. Finally, we demonstrate that pNMS can replicate experimental and simulation results from different environments and predict the population behaviors of neuromuscular cells depending on their organization and muscle length. With an intuitive, flexible application programming interface, this software tool may offer a solution for promoting efficient investigation and an in-depth understanding of neuromuscular function at cellular resolution under realistic scenarios.
papers.abstract_zh: 生物物理建模与模拟有助于全面理解正常与病理状态下肌肉力量生成与控制的神经肌肉机制。然而，由于神经肌肉细胞具有异质性（heterogeneity），且其组织方式因身体部位和年龄而异，这一过程费时费力且局限于特定条件。本研究提出了一种解决该问题的方法论：首先，构建了基于模块化（building-block）的逆向建模框架（inverse modeling framework），实现多种生理条件下的自动化群体构建与可处理的分层分析；其次，设计了基于网络文件夹（network folder-based）的虚拟环境技术，实现可在多核计算机、超级计算系统或互联网连接的计算机网络运行的高效并行模拟；第三，通过开发名为pNMS的开源命令行软件实现了该方法；最后，证明pNMS能够复现不同环境下的实验与模拟结果，并预测神经肌肉细胞群体行为取决于其组织方式和肌肉长度。该软件工具具备直观灵活的应用程序接口（application programming interface, API），可为现实场景下细胞分辨率（cellular resolution）水平的神经肌肉功能高效研究与深入理解提供解决方案。
key_findings: 构建逆向建模框架与模块化方法，实现生理条件下神经肌肉细胞群体的自动化构建与分层分析。
创建基于网络文件夹的虚拟环境技术，支持跨多核、超算及互联网环境的生物物理模型高效并行模拟。
开发开源软件pNMS，不仅能复现多环境实验与模拟结果，还可预测细胞组织方式和肌肉长度对群体行为的影响。

papers.title: The dual molecular identity of vestibular kinocilia bridges structural and functional traits of primary and motile cilia.
papers.abstract: Vestibular hair cells (HCs) convert gravitational and head motion cues into neural signals through mechanotransduction, mediated by the hair bundle-a mechanically integrated organelle composed of stereocilia and a kinocilium. The kinocilium, a specialized form of primary cilium, remains incompletely defined in structure, molecular composition, and function. To elucidate its characteristics, we conducted single-cell RNA sequencing of adult vestibular and cochlear HCs, uncovering a selective enrichment of primary and motile cilia-associated genes in vestibular HCs, particularly those related to the axonemal repeat complex. This enrichment of orthologous axoneme-related genes was conserved in zebrafish and human vestibular HCs, indicating a shared molecular architecture. Immunostaining validated the expression of key motile cilia markers in vestibular kinocilia. Moreover, live imaging of bullfrog and mouse HCs from crista ampullaris revealed spontaneous kinociliary motion. Together, these findings define the kinocilium as a unique organelle with molecular features of primary and motile cilia and suggest its previously unknown role as an active, force-generating element within the hair bundle.
papers.abstract_zh: 前庭毛细胞（HCs）通过机械转导将重力和头部运动信号转化为神经信号，该过程由毛细胞纤毛束介导——这是一种由静纤毛（stereocilia）和动纤毛（kinocilium）组成的机械整合细胞器。动纤毛作为初级纤毛（primary cilium）的一种特殊形式，其结构、分子组成和功能尚未完全阐明。为明确其特征，我们对成年前庭和耳蜗毛细胞进行了单细胞RNA测序，发现前庭毛细胞选择性富集初级和运动纤毛（motile cilia）相关基因，特别是与轴丝重复复合体（axonemal repeat complex）相关的基因。这种轴丝相关基因直系同源物的富集在斑马鱼和人类前庭毛细胞中保守存在，表明其具有共享的分子架构。免疫染色验证了关键运动纤毛标志物在前庭动纤毛中的表达。此外，对壶腹嵴（crista ampullaris）牛蛙和小鼠毛细胞的活细胞成像显示动纤毛存在自发运动。综上所述，这些发现将动纤毛定义为具有初级和运动纤毛分子特征的独特细胞器，并提示其作为毛细胞纤毛束内主动力量产生元件的未知作用。
key_findings: 单细胞测序揭示前庭毛细胞富集初级和运动纤毛相关基因，特别是轴丝重复复合体相关基因。
轴丝相关基因富集在斑马鱼和人类前庭毛细胞中保守，表明共享的分子架构。
免疫染色验证运动纤毛标志物表达，活细胞成像显示自发运动，提示动纤毛是主动的力量产生元件。

papers.title: Construction and Application of a Multicolor Bactosensor for Detecting Bioavailable Antibiotic Mixtures in the Environment.
papers.abstract: The advancement of synthetic biology has enabled transformative approaches for environmental monitoring, yet the simultaneous quantification of multiple co-occurring pollutants, an inherent feature of real environmental contamination, remains a significant challenge. In this study, we engineered a multicolor bactosensor capable of concurrently detecting tetracycline and erythromycin by integrating two transcription-factor-based sensing modules into a single plasmid and enhancing the performance by introducing antibiotic resistance genes. The bactosensor exhibited a high detection specificity toward individual tetracyclines and macrolides. Notably, it enabled quantitative discrimination of binary antibiotic mixtures through simple visual comparison of fluorescence color differences in bacterial images captured with a smartphone. The platform further demonstrated reliable accuracy in detecting antibiotics in real water samples. Overall, this work establishes a novel, field-deployable bactosensor for on-site quantification of antibiotic mixtures, particularly their bioavailable fractions, which are often overlooked in conventional chemical analyses.
papers.abstract_zh: 合成生物学的进步为环境监测带来了变革性方法，但共存多种污染物的同步定量（真实环境污染的固有特征）仍是重大挑战。本研究通过将两个基于转录因子的传感模块整合至单一质粒，并引入抗生素抗性基因以增强性能，构建了可同时检测四环素和红霉素的多色细菌传感器（bactosensor）。该传感器对四环素类和大环内酯类抗生素均表现出高特异性。值得注意的是，通过智能手机采集的细菌图像，仅需简单比对荧光颜色差异即可定量区分二元抗生素混合物。该平台在真实水样检测中展现出可靠准确性。总之，本工作建立了一种新型可现场部署的细菌传感器，能实现抗生素混合物的原位定量，特别是其生物可利用组分（bioavailable fractions），而这常被传统化学分析所忽略。
key_findings: 整合双转录因子传感模块与抗性基因至单一质粒，构建同步检测四环素和红霉素的多色细菌传感器。
利用智能手机图像的荧光颜色差异，实现二元抗生素混合物的快速可视化定量区分。
建立可现场部署的检测平台，能测定传统化学分析常忽略的生物可利用抗生素组分。

papers.title: Biomimetic metamaterial-based interface for decoding heterogeneous mechanodermal activity.
papers.abstract: The human skin acts as a dynamic biomechanical interface that conveys critical physiological and behavioral information through spatiotemporally distributed deformations. Because of the limited capabilities of current sensing technologies, the spatiotemporal diversity of its mechanical cues has remained underused to date, preventing these mechanisms from being used to capture and decode the full spectrum of underlying physiological states. In this work, we define this heterogeneous set of mechanical signals as mechanodermal activity (MDA) and introduce the biomimetic metamaterial-based interface (BMMI), an engineered auxetic metamaterial substrate that reproduces the microrelief and mechanoreceptor architecture of natural skin. The BMMI allows selective capture of diverse MDA signals from adjacent skin regions with simultaneous signal amplification and noise suppression and permits straightforward modulation to accommodate various scenarios. Combined with bespoke algorithms, the wireless BMMI device decodes MDA accurately and robustly for multimodal communication interfaces, unleashing applications in health care monitoring and human-machine interaction.
papers.abstract_zh: 人体皮肤作为动态生物力学界面，通过时空分布的形变传递关键生理和行为信息。由于现有传感技术的局限性，其机械线索的时空多样性迄今未被充分利用，阻碍了对潜在生理状态的全面捕获和解码。本工作中，我们将这组异质机械信号定义为机械皮肤活动（Mechanodermal Activity, MDA），并引入仿生超材料界面（Biomimetic Metamaterial-based Interface, BMMI）——一种工程化的拉胀超材料（auxetic metamaterial）基底，可重现天然皮肤的微地形（microrelief）和机械感受器架构。BMMI能够选择性捕获相邻皮肤区域的多样MDA信号，同时实现信号放大与噪声抑制，并可灵活调控以适应不同场景。结合定制算法，无线BMMI设备可准确稳健地解码MDA，用于多模态通信界面，在健康监测和人机交互领域展现出应用潜力。
key_findings: 首次定义MDA（机械皮肤活动）并开发BMMI（仿生超材料界面），重现天然皮肤微结构与感受器架构
实现异质机械信号的选择性捕获、同步放大与降噪，具备场景自适应调控能力
集成无线传输与定制算法，实现MDA精准解码，拓展健康监测与人机交互应用

papers.title: Piezo1-mediated mechanohydraulic control of cell volume drives cardiac morphogenesis.
papers.abstract: Organ morphogenesis is driven by physical forces, yet how mechanical stimuli pattern tissue shape and guide developmental programs remains poorly understood. In zebrafish, endocardial cells (EdCs) within the heart valve-forming region undergo marked volume reduction during early morphogenesis. Here, we uncover a hydraulics-based mechanism by which mechanical forces control EdC volume to direct cardiac development. We show that the mechanosensitive ion channel Piezo1 acts with the calcium-binding protein calmodulin (CaM) and the aquaporin Aqp8a.1 water channel to orchestrate EdC shrinkage. We find that Aqp8a.1 mediates cell volume loss by incorporating into the plasma membrane in response to mechanical stimulation, promoting heart looping and valve formation. Mechanistically, Piezo1 governs Aqp8a.1 through a dual mechanism. First, Piezo1 and CaM drive Aqp8a.1 plasma membrane incorporation, enabling rapid cell volume adjustments. Second, Piezo1 suppresses aqp8a.1 transcription via Notch1b signaling to prevent excessive shrinkage. Together, these findings reveal that mechanotransduction can dictate organ formation through dynamic cell volume regulation, uncovering a fundamental principle of morphogenesis.
papers.abstract_zh: 器官形态发生由物理力驱动，但机械刺激如何塑造组织形态并指导发育程序仍知之甚少。在斑马鱼中，心脏瓣膜形成区域内的心内膜细胞（EdCs）在早期形态发生过程中经历显著的体积减少。本研究揭示了一种基于流体力学的机制，机械力通过该机制控制EdC体积以指导心脏发育。研究表明，机械敏感离子通道Piezo1与钙结合蛋白钙调蛋白（CaM）及水通道蛋白Aqp8a.1协同作用，协调EdC收缩。研究发现，Aqp8a.1通过响应机械刺激整合至质膜介导细胞体积丢失，促进心脏环化和瓣膜形成。机制上，Piezo1通过双重机制调控Aqp8a.1：首先，Piezo1和CaM驱动Aqp8a.1质膜整合，实现快速的细胞体积调节；其次，Piezo1通过Notch1b信号抑制aqp8a.1转录以防止过度收缩。总之，这些发现揭示了机械转导可通过动态细胞体积调控决定器官形成，揭示了形态发生的基本原理。
key_findings: 建立Piezo1-CaM-Aqp8a.1轴介导心内膜细胞机械液压体积调控的新机制。
证明Aqp8a.1响应机械刺激插入质膜介导细胞收缩，驱动心脏环化与瓣膜形成。
揭示Piezo1通过膜转运和Notch1b转录抑制双重机制精确调控Aqp8a.1水平。

papers.title: Dual role of ZIC2 during neural induction: from priming transcription factor to enhancer activator.
papers.abstract: Defects in ZIC2, a member of the Zinc Finger of the Cerebellum family of transcription factors (TFs), cause holoprosencephaly, a congenital brain malformation characterized by the defective cleavage of cerebral hemispheres. However, the gene regulatory network (GRN) controlled by ZIC2 during neural development remains largely unexplored. Here, we combined a mouse embryonic stem cell (mESC) in vitro differentiation model toward anterior neural progenitors with genome editing and genomic methods to elucidate the ZIC2 GRN. We found that ZIC2 is dispensable in mESC due to compensation by ZIC3. In contrast, during neural induction ZIC2 directly controls the expression of master regulators implicated in the patterning and morphogenesis of specific brain regions (e.g. midbrain and roof plate). Mechanistically, ZIC2 plays a dual role in neural differentiation: during pluripotency exit, ZIC2 binds de novo to distal enhancers and increases their chromatin accessibility; during neural induction, ZIC2 is essential for the activation of a subset of the previously primed enhancers, which in turn control the expression of neural patterning regulators and signalling pathways (i.e. WNT) that prevent premature neuronal differentiation. Therefore, by sequentially acting as a promiscuous priming TF and selective enhancer activator, ZIC2 canalizes pluripotent cells toward neural progenitors with rostro-dorsal identities.
papers.abstract_zh: ZIC2是小脑锌指（Zinc Finger of the Cerebellum）家族转录因子成员，其缺陷会导致前脑无裂畸形，这是一种以大脑半球分离缺陷为特征的先天性脑畸形。然而，ZIC2在神经发育过程中控制的基因调控网络（GRN）仍未被充分探索。本研究结合小鼠胚胎干细胞（mESC）向前神经前体细胞体外分化模型、基因组编辑和基因组学方法，阐明了ZIC2的GRN。我们发现，由于ZIC3的补偿作用，ZIC2在mESC中是可有可无的。相反，在神经诱导过程中，ZIC2直接控制参与特定脑区（如中脑和顶板）模式形成和形态发生的主调控因子的表达。机制上，ZIC2在神经分化中发挥双重作用：在多能性退出阶段，ZIC2从头结合远端增强子并增加其染色质可及性；在神经诱导阶段，ZIC2对激活先前预激的增强子子集是必需的，这些增强子进而控制神经模式调控因子和信号通路（即WNT）的表达，以防止过早的神经元分化。因此，通过依次作为广谱预激转录因子和选择性增强子激活因子，ZIC2将多能细胞引导向具有头-背侧（rostro-dorsal）身份的神经前体细胞。
key_findings: ZIC2在mESC中因ZIC3补偿而可有可无，但在神经诱导阶段直接控制中脑和顶板等脑区模式形成的主调控因子表达
ZIC2在多能性退出时结合远端增强子增加染色质可及性，在神经诱导阶段选择性激活预激增强子以维持神经前体特性
通过调控WNT信号防止神经元过早分化，ZIC2依次作为预激转录因子和增强子激活因子引导多能细胞向头-背侧神经前体分化

papers.title: De novo chemo-optogenetics through the rational design of photoresponsive molecules and selection of their artificial protein binding pairs.
papers.abstract: Optical manipulation of proteins is central to probing and engineering cellular functions. However, existing optogenetic tools based on natural photoreceptors and chemo-optogenetic tools based on natural protein-ligand pairs are difficult to reconfigure for the desired photochemical and binding properties. Here we introduce a de novo approach for creating chemo-optogenetic tools. Instead of modifying pre-existing ligands, we first design a synthetic photoswitch with defined properties and then use mRNA display to select for artificial protein binders that recognize a specific photoisomer-dependent conformation. This bottom-up framework yields artificial photoswitch-protein binder pairs that enable precise optical control of diverse biological activities in mammalian cells, such as kinase and lipid signalling, G-protein-coupled receptor activation, gene expression and cell differentiation. The regulatory mode (sustained, reversible or repeatable) is readily programmed by adjusting light inputs. This de novo approach provides customizable synthetic photoswitch-protein binder pairs, expanding opportunities for optical protein manipulation in biological and biomedical applications.
papers.abstract_zh: 蛋白质的光学操控是探测和工程化细胞功能的核心手段。然而，基于天然光受体的现有光遗传学工具，以及基于天然蛋白-配体对的化学光遗传学工具，均难以针对理想的光化学和结合特性进行重新配置。本文介绍了一种创建化学光遗传学工具的从头（de novo）策略：不同于修饰现有配体，该策略首先理性设计具有特定性质的合成光控分子开关（synthetic photoswitch），然后利用 mRNA 展示技术（mRNA display）筛选能识别特定光异构体（photoisomer）依赖性构象的人工蛋白结合物。这种自下而上（bottom-up）的框架产生了人工光开关-蛋白结合物对，可在哺乳动物细胞中实现对激酶与脂质信号、G 蛋白偶联受体（GPCR）激活、基因表达及细胞分化等多种生物活动的精准光学控制。通过调整光输入，可便捷地编程设定持续型、可逆型或可重复型等调控模式。该从头策略提供了可定制化的合成光开关-蛋白结合物对，拓展了光学蛋白操控在生物学和生物医学应用中的可能性。
key_findings: 提出从头设计策略：先理性设计合成光开关，再筛选识别特定光异构体构象的人工蛋白结合物
建立自下而上框架，获得可定制化的人工光开关-蛋白结合物对，实现激酶信号、GPCR等多种细胞活动的精准光控
通过调节光输入即可编程设定持续、可逆或可重复等多种调控模式

papers.title: Genome editing of phylogenetically distinct bacteria using cross-species retron-mediated recombineering.
papers.abstract: Advanced genome editing technologies have enabled rapid, flexible rewriting of the Escherichia coli genome, but most have not been tested in other bacterial species. Recombitrons-a genome editing tool created by pairing modified, donor-producing bacterial retrons with single-stranded binding and annealing proteins-have increased the efficiency of recombineering to install flexible, precise edits in the prokaryotic chromosome. Here, to extend their utility outside of E. coli, we surveyed the portability and versatility of retron-mediated recombineering across three different bacterial phyla (Proteobacteria, Bacillota and Actinomycetota) and a total of 15 different species. We found that retron recombineering is variable across the species tested but functional in all of them, reaching editing efficiencies >20% in six of them, >40% in three and >90% in two. Efficiencies in the remaining nine species ranged from 0.015% to 7.4%. We also tested the extension of the recombitron architecture, operon and strain modifications in a subset of hosts in which species-specific modifications were required to increase editing rates.
papers.abstract_zh: 先进的基因组编辑技术已实现对大肠杆菌（Escherichia coli）基因组的快速、灵活重写，但大多数技术尚未在其他细菌物种中进行测试。重组逆转录子系统（Recombitrons）——通过将经过修饰的、可产生供体DNA的细菌逆转录子（retrons）与单链结合及退火蛋白配对而构建的基因组编辑工具——提高了重组工程（recombineering）的效率，可在原核生物染色体中实现灵活且精准的编辑。在本研究中，为拓展其在大肠杆菌以外的应用，我们评估了retron介导的重组工程在3个不同细菌门（变形菌门Proteobacteria、芽孢杆菌门Bacillota和放线菌门Actinomycetota）共15个物种中的可移植性与多功能性。我们发现，retron重组工程在不同物种间存在差异，但在所有测试物种中均具有功能：其中6个物种的编辑效率>20%，3个>40%，2个>90%；其余9个物种的效率范围为0.015%至7.4%。我们还测试了重组逆转录子系统架构、操纵子（operon）及菌株修饰的扩展应用，在部分宿主中需要通过物种特异性改造以提高编辑效率。
key_findings: 在3个菌门15种细菌中验证retron重组工程可跨物种应用，编辑效率差异显著（0.015%-90%+）
发现该系统在所有测试物种中均具功能，其中6种效率>20%，3种>40%，2种>90%
通过改造recombitron架构、操纵子及菌株背景，可实现物种特异性的编辑效率优化

papers.title: Spatiotemporal asymmetries on brain energy landscape uncover system entrapment related to depression severity.
papers.abstract: Large-scale brain activity at rest is thought to wander among a discrete set of attractor-like functional configurations shaped by underlying structural connections, yet how state-transitions are perturbed in major depressive disorder remains unknown. Here, we integrate resting-state functional imaging and diffusion-weighted structural connectivity in individuals with and without major depressive disorder to identify stable, recurring whole-brain coactivation patterns. More frequent and shorter-lived visits to a prominent salience-dominated configuration are associated with anhedonia in depression. Moreover, reduced state transitions between visual-attentional and limbic-default mode configurations are associated with greater depressive symptom severity, indicative of cognitive rigidity, and reflected as a transition preference for energetically costly trajectories despite structurally facilitated alternatives. Our findings show that the alterations in dynamic properties, transition frequencies, and energetic asymmetries define an imbalanced state-transition landscape in which the depressed brain becomes trapped between source- and sink-like attractors, providing a mechanistic interpretation of aberrant state trajectories in depression.
papers.abstract_zh: 静息态大规模脑活动被认为在由潜在结构连接塑造的离散类吸引子功能构型间游走，但重度抑郁症（major depressive disorder, MDD）中状态转换如何受到扰动仍不清楚。本研究整合静息态功能成像与弥散加权结构连接，在患有和未患有重度抑郁症的个体中识别稳定且重复出现的全脑共激活模式。更频繁且短暂地访问以显著性网络（salience network）为主导的构型与抑郁症中的快感缺失（anhedonia）相关。此外，视觉-注意与边缘-默认模式构型间的状态转换减少与更严重的抑郁症状相关，表明认知僵化，并表现为尽管存在结构便利的替代路径，但仍偏好能量成本较高的轨迹。我们的发现表明，动态特性、转换频率和能量不对称性的改变定义了一个失衡的状态转换景观，其中抑郁大脑被困在源型和汇型吸引子（source- and sink-like attractors）之间，为抑郁症中异常状态轨迹提供了机制性解释。
key_findings: 抑郁症患者更频繁且短暂地访问显著性主导脑功能构型，与快感缺失症状密切相关
视觉-注意与边缘-默认模式网络间状态转换减少与症状严重程度相关，反映认知僵化特征
抑郁大脑在能量景观中陷入源-汇型吸引子间的俘获状态，表现为高能耗轨迹偏好

papers.title: Yeast MoClo Secretion and Surface Display Toolkit 2.0: Improvements and Applications for Analysis of protein-protein Interactions and Whole-Cell Biocatalysis.
papers.abstract: Saccharomyces cerevisiae is an invaluable model organism for both fundamental biological research and biotechnological applications including recombinant protein production as well as protein and metabolic engineering. We previously developed a modular cloning (MoClo) based toolkit for S. cerevisiae that facilitates rapid optimization of signal peptides and anchor proteins for efficient secretion and/or surface display of heterologous proteins of interest. Here we describe further improvements and applications of this MoClo yeast secretion and display (MoClo YSD) toolkit. New parts encoding anchor proteins based on N-terminal fusion to a truncated Aga1 and C-terminal fusion to Aga2, each with three possible epitope tag options, are described. We also added parts that facilitate high throughput detection of secreted proteins of interest through GFP fluorescence complementation and parts encoding "secretion boosting" yeast proteins, whose overexpression has previously been reported to enhance secretion of heterologous proteins. In addition, two surface display applications of the toolkit are showcased. We demonstrate that yeast surface display of an anti-GFP nanobody allows cost-effective evaluation of the interactions of GFP-tagged proteins of interest, either by flow cytometry or yeast-based coimmunoprecipitation. In addition, using yeast cells as whole-cell catalysts, we show that codisplay of the poly(ethylene terephthalate) (PET) degrading enzyme leaf-branch compost cutinase with hydrophobin1 enhances the breakdown of PET plastic, while triple codisplay of these proteins with MHETase causes complete conversion of the intermediary monohydroxy-ethyl-terephthalate (MHET) to terephthalic acid. The diverse applications described herein demonstrate the broad applications of the updated MoClo YSD toolkit 2.0 in both synthetic biology and other research fields.
papers.abstract_zh: 酿酒酵母是基础生物学研究和生物技术应用（包括重组蛋白生产以及蛋白和代谢工程）中极其宝贵的模式生物。我们此前开发了一种基于模块化克隆（MoClo）的酿酒酵母工具包，可促进信号肽和锚定蛋白的快速优化，以高效分泌和/或表面展示目标异源蛋白。本文描述了该MoClo酵母分泌与展示（MoClo YSD）工具包的进一步改进和应用。我们介绍了编码新型锚定蛋白的部件：基于N端与截短Aga1融合以及C端与Aga2融合的锚定蛋白，每种均提供三种可选的表位标签。我们还添加了可通过GFP荧光互补实现目标分泌蛋白高通量检测的部件，以及编码"分泌增强"酵母蛋白的部件——此前报道称过表达这些蛋白可增强异源蛋白分泌。此外，本文展示了该工具包在表面展示方面的两项应用。我们证明，酵母表面展示抗GFP纳米抗体可通过流式细胞术或基于酵母的免疫共沉淀，对GFP标记的目标蛋白相互作用进行成本效益评估。此外，以酵母细胞作为全细胞催化剂，我们展示了聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯（PET）降解酶——叶枝堆肥角质酶与疏水蛋白1的共展示可增强PET塑料的分解，而这两种蛋白与MHETase的三重共展示则可将中间产物单羟基乙基对苯二甲酸酯（MHET）完全转化为对苯二甲酸。本文所述的多样化应用展示了升级版MoClo YSD工具包2.0在合成生物学及其他研究领域的广泛应用前景。
key_findings: 开发新型锚定蛋白模块（N端截短Aga1/C端Aga2）及分泌增强元件，拓展工具包功能
建立基于抗GFP纳米抗体表面展示的低成本蛋白互作分析平台，支持流式细胞术与免疫共沉淀
构建多酶共展示全细胞催化剂，实现PET塑料高效降解及中间产物MHET完全转化为对苯二甲酸

papers.title: Mechanical load inhibits cancer growth in mouse and human hearts.
papers.abstract: The heart rarely develops cancer, and, at the same time, it lacks regenerative capacity, as cardiomyocytes stop proliferating after birth. This suggests that mechanisms limiting cardiac regeneration may also protect against cancer. In this work, we investigated the role of mechanical load and used in vivo cancer models and ex vivo engineered heart tissues to show that mechanical load reduces cancer cell proliferation in the myocardium. Spatial transcriptomics of human cardiac metastases revealed decreased histone methylation and chromatin compaction. These changes affect chromatin accessibility at proliferation-related loci, with Nesprin-2 identified as a key mechanosensor. Our results uncover how mechanical forces protect the heart from cancer and suggest potential strategies for cancer therapy based on mechanical stimulation.
papers.abstract_zh: 心脏极少发生癌症，同时缺乏再生能力，因为心肌细胞在出生后停止增殖。这提示限制心脏再生的机制也可能具有抗癌保护作用。本研究探究了机械负荷的作用，利用体内（in vivo）癌症模型和离体（ex vivo）工程心脏组织证实，机械负荷可减少心肌内癌细胞的增殖。人心脏转移瘤的空间转录组学分析显示，组蛋白甲基化（histone methylation）和染色质压缩水平降低。这些变化影响了增殖相关位点的染色质可及性，并鉴定出Nesprin-2为关键机械传感器（mechanosensor）。我们的结果揭示了机械力保护心脏免于癌症的机制，并提出了基于机械刺激的潜在癌症治疗策略。
key_findings: 机械负荷可显著抑制小鼠和人类心肌组织中的癌细胞增殖
机械力通过降低组蛋白甲基化和染色质压缩影响增殖相关基因可及性
Nesprin-2是感知机械负荷并介导心脏抗癌效应的关键机械传感器

papers.title: TBL1X/TBL1XR1 govern β-cell identity through a PAX6-containing gene regulatory network.
papers.abstract: A main mechanism of β-cell dysfunction in diabetes is loss of identity, controlled by transcription factors that induce identity gene expression and disallowed gene repression. How transcription factors facilitate simultaneous expression and repression is not fully understood, representing a knowledge gap in diabetes research. We identify the transcriptional co-factors transducin β-like 1 x-linked (TBL1X) and its homolog TBL1X-related (TBL1XR1, together TBL/R1) as crucial regulators of β-cell identity and determinants of diabetes development and progression. β-cell specific TBL/R1 knockout in mice leads to progressive hypoinsulinemia and hyperglycemia. scRNA-sequencing reveals loss of β-cells, emergence of polyhormonal cells, and reduced β-cell maturity upon TBL/R1 knockout. Interactome screens and chromatin immunoprecipitation show TBL/R1 directly regulate insulin promoter activity through a PAX6-HDAC3 gene regulatory network, evident also in human models. TBL/R1 associates with diabetes in humans, thus our study uncovers an additional regulatory layer maintaining β-cell identity crucial for diabetes development and progression.
papers.abstract_zh: 糖尿病中β细胞功能障碍的主要机制是身份丧失，该过程由诱导身份基因表达并抑制disallowed基因的转录因子所调控。转录因子如何同时促进表达与抑制仍是糖尿病研究中的知识空白。本研究鉴定出转录辅因子转导素β样蛋白1 X连锁(TBL1X)及其同源物TBL1X相关蛋白(TBL1XR1，合称TBL/R1)是维持β细胞身份及决定糖尿病发生发展的关键因子。小鼠β细胞特异性敲除TBL/R1导致进行性低胰岛素血症和高血糖。单细胞RNA测序(scRNA-seq)显示敲除后出现β细胞丢失、多激素细胞涌现及成熟度下降。互作组筛选和染色质免疫共沉淀(ChIP)证实TBL/R1通过PAX6-HDAC3基因调控网络直接调控胰岛素启动子活性，且该机制在人类模型中得到验证。鉴于TBL/R1与人类糖尿病相关，本研究揭示了维持β细胞身份的关键调控新层级。
key_findings: 鉴定TBL1X/TBL1XR1为维持β细胞身份的关键转录辅因子，决定糖尿病发生发展
敲除TBL/R1导致β细胞丢失、多激素细胞出现及成熟度下降，引发进行性高血糖
揭示TBL/R1通过PAX6-HDAC3网络直接调控胰岛素启动子，在人类模型中得到验证

papers.title: Recurrent neural chemical reaction networks that approximate arbitrary dynamics.
papers.abstract: Many important phenomena in biochemistry and biology exploit dynamical features such as multi-stability, oscillations, and chaos. The construction of novel chemical systems with such rich dynamics is a challenging problem central to the fields of synthetic biology and molecular nanotechnology. In this paper, we address this problem by putting forward a molecular version of a recurrent artificial neural network, which we call a "recurrent neural chemical reaction network" (RNCRN). The RNCRN uses a modular architecture-a network of chemical neurons-to approximate arbitrary dynamics. We first prove that, with sufficiently many chemical neurons and suitably fast reactions, the RNCRN can be systematically trained to achieve any dynamics. RNCRNs with a relatively small number of chemical neurons and a moderate range of reaction rates are then trained to display a variety of biologically important dynamical features. We also demonstrate that such RNCRNs are experimentally implementable with DNA-strand-displacement technologies. A record of this paper's transparent peer review process is included in the supplemental information.
papers.abstract_zh: 许多生化和生物学中的重要现象都利用多稳态、振荡和混沌等动力学特征。构建具有此类丰富动力学的新型化学系统是合成生物学（synthetic biology）和分子纳米技术领域的核心挑战。本文通过提出一种分子层面的循环人工神经网络——即"循环神经化学反应网络"（recurrent neural chemical reaction network, RNCRN）——来解决该问题。RNCRN采用模块化架构（化学神经元网络）来逼近任意动力学行为。我们首先证明，只要拥有足够数量的化学神经元和足够快速的反应，RNCRN即可被系统训练以实现任意动力学。随后，我们用相对较少数量的化学神经元和中等范围的反应速率训练RNCRN，使其展示多种生物重要的动力学特征。我们还证实此类RNCRN可通过DNA链置换（DNA-strand-displacement）技术进行实验实现。本文的透明同行评审记录包含在补充信息中。
key_findings: 提出RNCRN架构并理论证明：足够数量的化学神经元与快速反应可系统训练实现任意动力学。
实验验证：少量化学神经元及中等反应速率即可实现多稳态、振荡与混沌等生物关键动态特征。
技术实现：证实RNCRN可通过DNA链置换技术实验构建，为合成生物学提供可实施分子方案。

papers.title: Synthetic multicolor antigen-stabilizable nanobody platform for intersectional labeling and functional imaging.
papers.abstract: We present a synthetic tool kit of antigen-stabilizable fluorescent nanobodies (VIS-Fbs) spanning the entire visible spectrum from 450 nm to 660 nm. By engineering over 20 fluorescent proteins (FPs) and biosensors into 8 nanobodies, we established a generalizable design of VIS-Fbs, which fluoresce brightly only upon binding to cognate antigens. Our synthetic approach includes constitutive, photoactivatable and photoswitchable FPs, as well as intensiometric FP-based biosensors. VIS-Fbs carrying biosensors enable simultaneous monitoring of two metabolites at confined locations, while FP-based VIS-Fbs targeting biosensors allow ratiometric functional imaging in mouse brain. We further used VIS-Fbs to track endogenous β-catenin dynamics in zebrafish embryos during normal development and under Wnt-β-catenin signaling modulation. VIS-Fbs provide background-free visualization of intracellular proteins, multicolor detection of multiple antigens and selective targeting of defined cell populations and compartments. This synthetic biology-driven platform enables precise studies of protein dynamics, cellular processes and complex biological systems with high specificity and minimal background.

papers.title: A pro-carcinogenic bacterial toxin binds claudin-4 to cleave E-cadherin.
papers.abstract: The human colon is colonized by trillions of bacteria that play substantial roles in human health and disease1. Epidemiological and experimental studies suggest that certain colonic bacteria can stimulate the development and progression of colorectal cancer2. One such bacterium, enterotoxigenic Bacteroides fragilis, drives colon tumour formation through the action of a single toxin, the B. fragilis toxin (BFT)3,4. BFT is a metalloprotease that binds to a colonic epithelial cell receptor and causes cleavage of the E-cadherin ectodomain, leading to epithelial barrier disruption, inflammation and increased cellular proliferation4-6. However, the identity of the BFT receptor is unknown and the molecular mechanism of BFT-initiated E-cadherin cleavage is not well understood. Here we identify claudin-4 as a BFT receptor through a genome-wide CRISPR screen and demonstrate that claudin-4 binding promotes BFT-mediated cleavage of cell surface E-cadherin. Our work both sheds light on BFT's mechanism of action and opens avenues for the development of anti-BFT therapies, which may prove useful for colorectal cancer prevention and treatment of acute enterotoxigenic B. fragilis infection.
papers.abstract_zh: 人体结肠定植着数万亿细菌，在人类健康和疾病中发挥重要作用。流行病学和实验研究表明，某些结肠细菌可促进结直肠癌的发生发展。其中，产肠毒素脆弱拟杆菌（enterotoxigenic Bacteroides fragilis）通过其单一毒素——脆弱拟杆菌毒素（BFT）驱动结肠肿瘤形成。BFT是一种金属蛋白酶，可结合结肠上皮细胞受体并导致E-钙粘蛋白（E-cadherin）胞外域切割，引起上皮屏障破坏、炎症和细胞增殖增加。然而，BFT受体身份未知，且BFT启动E-cadherin切割的分子机制尚不清楚。本研究通过全基因组CRISPR（成簇规律间隔短回文重复序列）筛选鉴定claudin-4为BFT受体，并证明claudin-4结合促进BFT介导的细胞表面E-cadherin切割。该工作不仅阐明了BFT的作用机制，也为开发抗BFT疗法开辟了新途径，可能对结直肠癌预防和急性产肠毒素脆弱拟杆菌感染治疗具有重要价值。
key_findings: 通过全基因组CRISPR筛选鉴定claudin-4是BFT毒素的受体蛋白
阐明claudin-4结合促进BFT介导细胞表面E-cadherin切割的分子机制
为结直肠癌预防和急性感染治疗提供抗BFT疗法开发新策略

papers.title: An in vitro approach for simulating divergent Golgi O-glycosylation of tumor-associated MUC1 from normal MUC1.
papers.abstract: Peptide O-glycosylation relies on the coordinated action of glycosyltransferases across the endoplasmic reticulum (ER) and Golgi apparatus. However, the molecular mechanisms driving aberrant glycosylation in cancer remain poorly understood. Here we show an in vitro one-pot synthetic biology approach that simulates divergent glycosylation pathways to map the synthesis of mucin 1 (MUC1) tumor-associated antigens. By modeling the cancer-associated relocation of initiation enzymes (GALNTs) to the ER, we demonstrate that this spatial shift leads to complete GalNAc (Tn antigen) occupancy. This occurs because ER localization extends reaction times and prevents inhibition by downstream Golgi enzymes. Furthermore, combined kinetic and computer reaction dynamic simulations reveal that ST6GALNAC1 exclusively drives α-2-6 sialylation, with a strict preference for the T13 site on fully glycosylated MUC1. This suggests that cancer-associated sTn upregulation is directly linked to T13 occupancy. Ultimately, this systems modeling approach decodes the enzyme localization and substrate specificities fundamental to tumourigenesis.
papers.abstract_zh: 肽段O-糖基化依赖于糖基转移酶在内质网(ER)和高尔基体之间的协同作用。然而，驱动癌症中异常糖基化的分子机制仍不清楚。本研究开发了一种体外一锅式合成生物学方法，模拟分歧的糖基化通路以绘制黏蛋白1 (MUC1)肿瘤相关抗原的合成图谱。通过模拟起始酶（GALNTs，多肽N-乙酰半乳糖胺转移酶）在癌症中向ER的异常定位，我们证明这种空间移位导致完全GalNAc（Tn抗原）占据。这是因为ER定位延长了反应时间，并避免了下游高尔基体酶的抑制。此外，结合动力学和计算机反应动力学模拟显示，ST6GALNAC1（ST6 N-乙酰半乳糖胺α-2,6-唾液酸转移酶1）专门驱动α-2-6唾液酸化，并对完全糖基化MUC1的T13位点具有严格偏好性。这表明癌症相关的sTn（唾液酸Tn抗原）上调与T13位点占据直接相关。最终，这种系统建模方法解码了肿瘤发生根本的酶定位和底物特异性。
key_findings: 模拟GALNTs向ER异常定位，揭示其通过延长反应时间实现MUC1完全Tn抗原糖基化
ST6GALNAC1严格选择性催化MUC1的T13位点α-2-6唾液酸化，解释肿瘤sTn抗原上调机制
建立体外一锅式合成生物学平台，系统解析酶空间定位与底物特异性对肿瘤糖基化的调控规律

papers.title: Integrating theory and machine learning to reveal determinants of plasmid copy number.
papers.abstract: Plasmids are extrachromosomal mobile genetic elements whose copy numbers (PCNs) critically influence microbial evolution, antibiotic resistance and pathogenicity. Despite their importance and immense diversity, the ecological, evolutionary and molecular factors determining PCN remain poorly understood. Here, we present a theoretical model to explain the empirical power-law relationship between plasmid size and copy number, one of the fundamental quantitative principles governing PCN control. However, this relationship alone has limited predictive power. To improve PCN prediction, we introduce a data-driven approach incorporating diverse features. Trained and tested on 11,051 plasmids, our machine learning model achieves significantly enhanced accuracy, with plasmid-encoded protein domains emerging as key predictors. Applying this framework, we conduct a large-scale analysis of PCN distributions across hundreds of thousands of metagenomic plasmids (IMG/PR database) and tens of thousands of clinical isolates, revealing putative niche specific taxonomic PCN hotspots and hypothesis-generating ecological trends. These results provide valuable insights into plasmid ecology, antibiotic resistance genes (ARGs) surveillance and shed lights on the gut plasmidome, a "dark matter" in human microbiome.
papers.abstract_zh: 质粒是染色体外可移动遗传元件，其拷贝数（PCNs）对微生物进化、抗生素耐药性和致病性具有关键影响。尽管质粒具有重要生态意义且多样性极高，但决定PCN的生态、进化及分子因素仍知之甚少。本研究构建了理论模型，阐释了质粒大小与拷贝数之间的经验性幂律关系——这一调控PCN的基础定量规律。然而，仅凭该关系预测能力有限。为提升PCN预测精度，我们引入整合多维度特征的数据驱动方法。该机器学习模型基于11,051个质粒进行训练与测试，显著提高了预测准确性，并揭示质粒编码的蛋白结构域为关键预测因子。应用此框架，我们对数十万宏基因组质粒（IMG/PR数据库）及数万临床分离株开展大规模PCN分布分析，发现了推定的生态位特异性分类学PCN热点及具有假说生成价值的生态趋势。这些结果为质粒生态学、抗生素耐药基因（ARGs）监测提供了重要见解，并为人体微生物组中的"暗物质"——肠道质粒组研究带来新启示。
key_findings: 构建理论模型首次阐释质粒大小与拷贝数间幂律关系的分子基础
机器学习模型识别出质粒编码蛋白结构域为预测拷贝数的关键决定因子
大规模分析揭示生态位特异性PCN热点及抗生素耐药基因分布规律

papers.title: Spatio-temporal modelling of in vitro influenza A virus infection: The impact of defective interfering particles on the type I interferon response.
papers.abstract: Defective interfering particles (DIPs) are incomplete viral genomes that modulate infection by competing with wild-type viruses and activating the innate immune response. Activation of the immune response leads to the production of cytokines and chemokines, including type I interferon (IFN), which restricts viral growth and may cause cell death. How DIPs interact with type I interferon (IFN) in spatially structured environments remains unclear. Focusing here on influenza A viruses, we developed a spatially explicit, stochastic model of in vitro viral infection that integrates virus and DIP replication, IFN signalling, and alternative dispersal modes. We find that: (1) our model captures the ring-like and patchy plaque morphologies observed experimentally; (2) IFN production peaks at an intermediate DIP ratio, reflecting a trade-off between early immune activation and sufficient co-infection; and (3) even a small fraction of long-range spread by virus and DIPs enables escape from the immune-based containment despite long-range IFN diffusion; this causes stronger antiviral responses but earlier peaks in virus egress at similar levels of cell loss. The model is available as an interactive platform: https://shiny-spatial-infection-app-production.up.railway.app/.
papers.abstract_zh: 缺陷干扰颗粒（DIPs）是通过与野生型病毒竞争并激活先天免疫反应来调节病毒复制的不完整病毒基因组。免疫反应激活导致细胞因子和趋化因子（包括I型干扰素（IFN））的产生，从而限制病毒生长并可能引起细胞死亡。DIPs在空间结构化环境中如何与I型干扰素相互作用仍不清楚。本研究聚焦甲型流感病毒，开发了整合病毒与DIP复制、IFN信号传导及多种传播模式的空间显式随机模型。我们发现：（1）模型成功捕捉了实验中观察到的环状和斑片状噬斑形态；（2）IFN产量在中等DIP比例时达到峰值，反映了早期免疫激活与充分共感染之间的权衡；（3）即使病毒和DIPs仅有少量长距离扩散，也能使其逃逸基于免疫的控制，尽管IFN具有长距离扩散能力；这导致更强的抗病毒反应，但在相似细胞损失水平下病毒释放峰值出现更早。该模型已作为交互平台发布：https://shiny-spatial-infection-app-production.up.railway.app/。
key_findings: 构建的空间显式随机模型成功重现了环状与斑片状噬斑形态，符合体外实验观察
IFN产量在中等DIP比例时达到峰值，反映早期免疫激活与充分共感染之间的权衡关系
少量长距离扩散即可介导病毒逃逸免疫控制，引发更强抗病毒反应但更早的病毒释放峰值

papers.title: Using experimental results of protein design to guide biomolecular energy-function development.
papers.abstract: Computational models of macromolecules have many applications in biochemistry, but physical inaccuracies limit their utility. One class of models uses energy functions rooted in classical mechanics. The standard datasets used to train these models are limited in diversity, pointing to a need for new training data. Here, we sought to explore a new paradigm for training an energy function, where the Rosetta energy function was used to design de novo proteins. Experimental results on these designs were then used to identify failure modes of design, which were subsequently used as a "guiding principle" to retrain the energy function. Specifically, we examined a diverse set of de novo protein designs experimentally tested for their ability to stably fold, identifying unstable designs that were predicted to be stable by the Rosetta energy function. Using deep mutational scanning, we identified single amino-acid mutations that rescued the stability of these designs, providing insight into common failure modes of the energy function. We identified one key failure mode, involving steric clashing in protein cores. We identified similar overpacking when using Rosetta to refine high-resolution protein crystal structures, quantified the degree of overpacking, and refit a small set of energy-function parameters to better recapitulate native-like packing. Following fitting, we largely eliminated the failure mode in the refinement task, while retaining performance on other benchmarks, resulting in an updated version of the Rosetta energy function. This work shows how learning from protein designs can guide energy-function development.

papers.title: A quantitative in vivo CRISPR-imaging platform identifies regulators of hyperplastic and hypertrophic adipose morphology in zebrafish.
papers.abstract: Adipose tissues exhibit a remarkable capacity to expand, regress, and remodel in response to energy status. The cellular mechanisms underlying adipose remodelling are central to metabolic health. Hypertrophic remodelling - characterised by the enlargement of existing adipocytes - is associated with insulin resistance, type 2 diabetes, and cardiovascular disease. In contrast, hyperplastic remodelling - in which new adipocytes are generated - is linked to improved metabolic outcomes. Despite its clinical importance, the regulation of hypertrophic and hyperplastic adipose morphology remains poorly understood. Here, we integrate human transcriptomic data with a quantitative CRISPR-imaging platform in zebrafish to identify regulators of adipose morphology. We developed an image-based phenotyping pipeline that captures lipid droplet size, number, and spatial patterning, and applied generalised additive modelling to quantify hyperplastic versus hypertrophic morphology signatures. Using this platform, we conducted an F0 CRISPR screen targeting 25 candidate genes and identified three that induced hypertrophic morphology (txnipa, mmp14b, and foxp1b) and an additional candidate that altered total adiposity (kazna). For functional validation, we generated stable loss-of-function alleles for both zebrafish foxp1 paralogues. Spatial analysis along the anterior-posterior axis revealed that foxp1b mutants display developmental hypertrophy but profoundly blunted adaptive responses to high-fat diet (~68% reduction across all spatial zones), while foxp1a mutants show normal baseline morphology but disrupted spatial patterning of diet-induced hypertrophy. Together, these findings establish a scalable CRISPR-imaging platform for in vivo genetic screening of adipose morphology and reveal distinct roles for Foxp1 paralogues in developmental patterning and adaptive responses to dietary challenge in adipose tissue.
keywords: Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats
papers.abstract_zh: 脂肪组织具有随能量状态而扩张、消退和重塑的显著能力。调控脂肪重塑的细胞机制是代谢健康的核心。肥大性重塑（以现有脂肪细胞体积增大为特征）与胰岛素抵抗、2型糖尿病和心血管疾病相关；而增生性重塑（以新生脂肪细胞生成为特征）则与改善的代谢结局相关。尽管具有重要临床意义，增生性与肥大性脂肪形态的调控机制仍知之甚少。本研究整合人类转录组数据与斑马鱼定量CRISPR成像平台，识别脂肪形态的调控因子。我们开发了基于图像的表型分析流程，捕获脂滴大小、数量和空间分布模式，并应用广义加性模型量化增生性与肥大性形态特征。利用该平台，我们对25个候选基因进行F0代CRISPR筛选，鉴定出3个诱导肥大性形态的基因（txnipa、mmp14b和foxp1b）及1个改变总脂肪量的候选基因（kazna）。为进行功能验证，我们构建了斑马鱼两个foxp1旁系同源基因的稳定功能缺失等位基因。沿前后轴的空间分析显示，foxp1b突变体呈现发育性肥大，但对高脂饮食的适应性反应显著受阻（所有空间区域降低约68%），而foxp1a突变体显示正常基线形态，但饮食诱导肥大的空间模式被破坏。这些发现建立了一个可扩展的体内遗传筛选CRISPR成像平台，并揭示Foxp1旁系同源基因在脂肪组织发育模式构建和饮食挑战适应性反应中的不同作用。
key_findings: 建立定量体内CRISPR成像平台，实现脂肪组织增生与肥大形态的高通量表型分析
筛选鉴定txnipa、mmp14b和foxp1b为诱导脂肪细胞肥大性重塑的关键调控因子
揭示Foxp1旁系同源基因功能分化：foxp1b主导适应性肥大反应，foxp1a调控空间分布模式

papers.title: Designing soft materials through synthetic morphogenesis.
papers.abstract: While the principles of Turing-type morphogenesis are central to understanding biological pattern formation, their rational application for the design of synthetic materials remains a significant challenge. To address this gap, we rationally design stationary reaction-diffusion patterns using a chemical reaction network (CRN) of small organic molecules bearing thiol groups - a functional handle ubiquitous in materials chemistry. The CRN features autocatalysis coupled with both rapid direct inhibition and a negative feedback loop. We report the formation of dot, line, and net patterns obtained with the assistance of numerical modeling by adjusting reactant feed rates and concentrations. The use of disulfide-crosslinked polyacrylamide hydrogels enables the modulation of thiol diffusion and subsequent derivatization of the immobilized thiols with dyes, enzymes, and crosslinkers to produce soft materials. This entire process, from out-of-equilibrium self-organization to a patterned soft material, conceptually resembles the biological process that gives rise to skin patterns. Overall, this work establishes a pathway for applying Turing-type self-organization to the structuring of synthetic matter.
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管图灵型形态发生（Turing-type morphogenesis）的原理是理解生物图案形成的核心，但将其理性应用于合成材料设计仍面临重大挑战。为填补这一空白，我们利用含巯基（thiol）的小分子构建化学反应网络（chemical reaction network, CRN），理性设计定态反应-扩散图案——巯基是材料化学中普遍存在的功能基团。该CRN具有自催化特性，并与快速直接抑制及负反馈回路相耦合。借助数值模拟，通过调节反应物进料速率和浓度，我们获得了点状、线状和网状图案。利用二硫键交联的聚丙烯酰胺水凝胶（disulfide-crosslinked polyacrylamide hydrogels）调控巯基扩散，并将固定化的巯基衍生化为染料、酶和交联剂，从而制备出软材料。从非平衡自组织到图案化软材料的整个过程，在概念上类似于产生皮肤图案的生物学过程。总之，本研究建立了将图灵型自组织应用于合成物质结构化的途径。
key_findings: 核心发现1：构建含巯基小分子的化学反应网络（CRN），耦合自催化与双重抑制机制，实现定态反应-扩散图案
核心发现2：通过调节反应物进料参数，在数值模拟辅助下可编程生成点、线、网状等多样定态图案
核心发现3：利用二硫键交联水凝胶固定图案并功能化，建立从非平衡自组织到图案化软材料的合成途径

papers.title: Toward sustainable food preservatives: high-level production of sorbic acid in engineered Saccharomyces cerevisiae.
papers.abstract: Sorbic acid (SA) and its salts are among the world's most widely used and safest food preservatives, yet their industrial production still relies on fossil fuel-derived feedstocks via chemical synthesis. Here, we report bioproduction of SA through microbial fermentation by decoding its biosynthetic pathway and metabolic engineering of Saccharomyces cerevisiae as a chassis. Here, we identify SA and its amide derivative sorbamide (SN) from Myrothecium sp. FJNU6, representing identification of SA from a microbial source. Genome sequencing and heterologous expression reveal the SA/SN biosynthetic gene cluster, comprising a highly reducing polyketide synthase (SoaA), a hydrolase (SoaB), and an amidotransferase (SoaC). To enable sustainable overproduction, we reconstitute and optimize the SoaA-SoaB pathway in S. cerevisiae through multilevel engineering, including dynamic promoter control, acetyl-CoA/malonyl-CoA pathway enhancement, peroxisomal compartmentalization, and two-stage fed-batch fermentation. These strategies collectively enable a production titer of 1.84 g/L SA in a 50 L bioreactor. This study uncovers a microbial biosynthetic pathway for SA/SN and establishes a microbial platform for SA production, providing a foundation for developing sustainable alternatives to fossil-based manufacturing.
papers.abstract_zh: 山梨酸（SA）及其盐类是全球最广泛使用且最安全的食物防腐剂之一，但其工业生产仍依赖化石燃料衍生的原料通过化学合成实现。本研究通过解析SA生物合成途径并对酿酒酵母（Saccharomyces cerevisiae）进行代谢工程改造，实现了SA的微生物发酵生产。研究从拟帚霉属（Myrothecium sp.）FJNU6中鉴定出SA及其酰胺衍生物山梨酰胺（SN），首次发现微生物来源的SA。基因组测序和异源表达揭示了SA/SN生物合成基因簇，包含高还原型聚酮合酶（SoaA）、水解酶（SoaB）和酰胺转移酶（SoaC）。为实现可持续高产，研究通过多层次工程策略在酿酒酵母中重构并优化SoaA-SoaB途径，包括动态启动子调控、乙酰辅酶A/丙二酰辅酶A途径增强、过氧化物酶体区室化以及两阶段补料分批发酵。这些策略在50 L生物反应器中实现了1.84 g/L的SA产量。本研究揭示了SA/SN的微生物生物合成途径，建立了SA生产的微生物平台，为开发化石基制造的可持续替代方案奠定基础。
key_findings: 从拟帚霉属真菌中首次鉴定山梨酸生物合成基因簇及其聚酮合酶SoaA。
在酿酒酵母中重构SoaA-SoaB途径，50L发酵罐产量达1.84 g/L。
整合动态启动子调控、前体供应增强与过氧化物酶体区室化实现高效合成。

papers.title: Effects of sensorimotor delays and muscle force capacity limits on the performance of feedforward and feedback control in animals of different sizes.
papers.abstract: Animals rely on feedforward and feedback control for perturbation responses. When comparing terrestrial mammals of different sizes, we generally find that several features that affect perturbation responses change-larger animals have longer sensorimotor time delays, heavier body segments, and proportionally weaker muscles. We used simple computational models to study how control of fast perturbation responses is constrained by two limitations-sensorimotor delays and muscle force capacity-as a function of animal size. We developed two tasks representing common perturbation response scenarios in animal locomotion: a distributed mass pendulum approximating swing limb repositioning (swing task), and an inverted pendulum approximating whole body posture recovery (posture task). First, we used a normalized feedback control system to show how feedback response times can either be limited by the force generation capacity of muscles (force-limited), or by sensorimotor delays which constrain the maximum feedback gains that can be used to produce stable responses (delay-limited). Next, we used more detailed scaled models which represent the full size range of terrestrial mammals and parameterized the sensorimotor delays, maximum muscle forces, and inertial properties using scaling relationships from literature. Across animal size and in both tasks, we found that feedback control was primarily delay-limited-the fastest responses used a fraction of the available muscle force capacity. We compared feedback control to the fastest feedforward control strategy, and found that feedforward control response times were about four times faster than feedback control in the smallest animals, and around two times faster in the largest animals. For rapid perturbation responses, feedback control appears ineffective for terrestrial mammals of all sizes, as our simulated fastest response times exceeded available movement times. Thus, feedforward control strategies-including anticipatory adjustments, ballistic motor programs, and exploitation of intrinsic musculoskeletal dynamics-may be essential for reacting quickly to sudden and large perturbations in terrestrial mammals.
papers.abstract_zh: 动物依赖前馈和反馈控制应对扰动。比较不同体型陆生哺乳动物时发现，影响扰动响应的多个特征随体型变化——体型越大，感觉运动时间延迟越长、身体节段越重、肌肉相对越弱。本研究利用简单计算模型，探究快速扰动响应的控制如何受感觉运动延迟和肌肉力量容量这两种限制的约束。我们构建了两种任务模拟动物运动中的典型扰动响应场景：分布式质量摆模拟摆动肢体重定位（摆动任务），倒立摆模拟全身姿势恢复（姿势任务）。首先，通过标准化反馈控制系统证明，反馈响应时间或受肌肉力量生成容量限制（力量受限），或受感觉运动延迟限制——后者制约了产生稳定响应的最大反馈增益（延迟受限）。随后，使用涵盖陆生哺乳动物完整体型范围的详细缩放模型，根据文献中的缩放关系参数化感觉运动延迟、最大肌肉力量及惯性特性。结果显示，跨越所有体型和两种任务，反馈控制主要受延迟限制，最快响应仅利用部分肌肉力量容量。与最快前馈控制策略比较发现，前馈响应时间在小动物中比反馈控制快约4倍，在大动物中快约2倍。对于快速扰动响应，反馈控制对所有体型陆生哺乳动物均无效，因其模拟的最快响应时间超过了可用运动时间。因此，前馈控制策略——包括预期调整、弹道运动程序及利用内在肌肉骨骼动力学——对陆生哺乳动物快速应对突发大幅度扰动可能至关重要。
key_findings: 反馈控制主要受感觉运动延迟限制，最快响应仅利用部分可用肌肉力量容量
前馈控制响应速度显著快于反馈控制，小动物快4倍，大动物快约2倍
快速扰动下反馈控制对所有体型动物均无效，前馈控制策略至关重要

papers.title: Orderly mitosis shapes interphase genome architecture.
papers.abstract: Genomes assume a complex 3D architecture in the interphase cell nucleus. Yet the molecular mechanisms that determine global genome architecture are only poorly understood. To identify mechanisms of higher-order genome organization, we performed high-throughput imaging-based CRISPR knockout screens targeting 1064 genes encoding nuclear proteins in multiple human cell lines. We assessed changes in the distribution of centromeres at single-cell resolution as surrogate markers for global genome organization. The screens revealed multiple major regulators of spatial distribution of centromeres, including components of the nucleolus, kinetochore, cohesins, condensins, and the nuclear pore complex. Alterations in centromere distribution required progression through the cell cycle and acute depletion of mitotic factors with distinct functions altered centromere distribution in the subsequent interphase. These results identify molecular determinants of spatial centromere organization, and they show that orderly progression through mitosis shapes interphase genome architecture.
papers.abstract_zh: 基因组在间期细胞核中呈现复杂的三维结构。然而，决定全局基因组结构的分子机制目前仍知之甚少。为鉴定高阶基因组组织的机制，我们在多种人类细胞系中开展了基于高通量成像的CRISPR敲除筛选，靶向1064个编码核蛋白的基因。我们以单细胞分辨率评估了着丝粒分布的变化，将其作为全局基因组组织的替代标志物。筛选发现了着丝粒空间分布的多个主要调控因子，包括核仁、动粒（kinetochore）、黏连蛋白（cohesins）、凝缩蛋白（condensins）和核孔复合体的组分。着丝粒分布的改变需要细胞周期进程，急性耗竭具有不同功能的有丝分裂因子会改变随后间期中的着丝粒分布。这些结果鉴定了着丝粒空间组织的分子决定因素，并表明有序的有丝分裂进程塑造了间期基因组结构。
key_findings: 通过CRISPR筛选鉴定了核仁、动粒、黏连蛋白等着丝粒空间分布的关键调控因子
有丝分裂因子的急性耗竭会导致随后间期着丝粒分布的显著改变
有序的有丝分裂进程是塑造间期基因组三维架构的重要机制

papers.title: Protein Scaffold-Driven Enzyme Colocalization Combined with Glucose Derepression in Candida tropicalis Enables High-Level 1,2,4-Butanetriol Production.
papers.abstract: 1,2,4-Butanetriol is a crucial fine chemical intermediate for energetic materials, high-value-added chemicals, and pharmaceuticals; however, its microbial biosynthesis pathway is often hindered by intermediate accumulation and imbalanced metabolic flux. To overcome these challenges, Candida tropicalis was employed as the chassis, and a synergistic strategy integrating protein scaffold-driven enzyme colocalization with key enzyme engineering was developed to optimize the pathway from xylose. Stage-specific repression of xylose dehydrogenase (XylB) confirmed the growth inhibition caused by xylonate. To alleviate substrate channeling limitations, a spatial colocalization strategy was employed by fusing the key enzymes XylB, xylonate dehydratase (XylD), and α-keto-acid decarboxylase (KdcA) with scaffold ligands and modulating the protein scaffold [GBD]x-[SH3]y-[PDZ]z domain ratio to an optimal 1:3:1, enabling their programmable assembly into a highly efficient multienzyme complex. Subsequently, deletion of mig1 enhanced the xylose utilization efficiency, while pathway efficiency was further optimized via synergistic enzyme engineering, which included overexpressing the ligand-fused XylD and KdcA mutants. This integrated approach raised the 1,2,4-butanetriol titer to 2.1 g/L in shake flasks and 11.18 g/L in a 5 L bioreactor. This study validates the effectiveness and broad application prospects of integrating spatial colocalization of metabolic pathways with metabolic engineering in enhancing the performance of complex metabolic pathways.
