papers.title: Astral architecture can enhance mechanical strength of cytoskeletal networks by modulating percolation thresholds.
papers.abstract: A repeated pattern in cytoskeletal architecture is the aster, in which a number of F-actin filaments emerge star shaped from a central node. Aster-based structures occur in cytoplasmic actin, the early stages of the cytokinetic ring in yeast, and in the context of biomimetic materials engineering. In this work, we use computational simulation to show that there is an optimal number of filaments per aster that maximizes rigidity, even at a fixed density of F-actin. This nonlinear dependence holds for both the shear and extensional moduli. At physiological parameters, the maximum corresponds approximately to the same filaments per aster observed in recent super-resolution images of cortical F-actin. Furthermore, we find that increasing filaments per aster leads to dramatic increases in the sample-to-sample variability in network rigidity. We explain both effects using percolation theory, wherein the probability that a given network is productively connected exhibits a sharp dependence on parameters. The dependence of network rigidity on this nanoscale architectural feature may suggest a mechanism by which cells tune the physical properties of their actin networks locally and rapidly (since no new F-actin must be assembled) and may inform efforts to create adaptive synthetic metamaterials inspired by actin networks.
papers.abstract_zh: 细胞骨架结构中的一种重复模式是星状体（aster），其中多条F-肌动蛋白（F-actin）丝从中心节点呈星形发出。基于星状体的结构存在于细胞质肌动蛋白、酵母细胞分裂环的早期阶段以及仿生材料工程背景下。在本研究中，我们利用计算模拟证明，即使F-肌动蛋白密度固定，每个星状体仍存在最优丝束数可使刚性最大化。这种非线性依赖关系同时适用于剪切模量和延伸模量。在生理参数条件下，该最大值与近期超分辨率成像中观察到的皮质F-肌动蛋白每个星状体的丝束数大致相符。此外，我们发现增加每个星状体的丝束数会导致网络刚性样本间变异显著增大。我们利用渗流（percolation）理论解释这两种效应，其中给定网络有效连通的概率对参数表现出锐化依赖。网络刚性对这种纳米尺度结构特征的依赖性可能提示细胞通过局部快速调节（无需组装新的F-肌动蛋白）其肌动蛋白网络物理性质的机制，并可为创建受肌动蛋白网络启发的自适应合成超材料提供参考。
key_findings: 星状体结构存在最优丝束数使刚性最大化，该最优值与生理条件下皮质F-actin超分辨率观测结果相符
剪切模量和延伸模量均表现出对丝束数的非线性依赖，且不随F-actin密度固定而消失
增加丝束数会显著增大网络刚性的样本间变异，此现象可通过渗流理论中连通概率的锐化依赖解释

papers.title: Impact of red blood cell rigidity on in vivo flow dynamics and lingering in bifurcations.
papers.abstract: Bifurcations are a crucial part of the mammalian microvasculature, as they establish the interface between blood and tissue. The flexibility of red blood cells (RBCs), the main cellular constituent of blood, is believed to strongly impact their partitioning, quantitative in vivo measurements have so far been elusive. This study investigates the effect of cell rigidity on the lateral movement after arteriole bifurcations and lingering by comparing the movement of artificially rigidified RBCs with that of healthy RBCs in vivo. Lingering describes a recently highlighted phenomenon in which RBCs reside in the bifurcation between two branches before entering either one. Our results show that increased RBC rigidity reduces lingering and, contrary to expectations, leaves healthy RBCs with a lower speed than rigidified RBCs in some areas of the microcirculation. We conclude that rigid RBCs show a different flow behavior leading to reduced wall contact potentially altering endothelial signaling and nutrient delivery and show a different partitioning at bifurcations.
papers.abstract_zh: 分叉是哺乳动物微血管系统的关键组成部分，构成了血液与组织间的界面。红细胞（red blood cells, RBCs）作为血液的主要细胞成分，其柔韧性被认为强烈影响细胞在分叉处的分配，但定量体内测量迄今难以实现。本研究通过比较人工刚性化红细胞与健康红细胞在体内的运动，探讨细胞刚性对小动脉分叉后横向运动及滞留（lingering）现象的影响。滞留是指红细胞在进入任一分支前暂居于两分支间分叉区域的近期发现的现象。结果表明，红细胞刚性增加会减少滞留；与预期相反，在某些微循环区域，健康红细胞的速度反而低于刚性化红细胞。我们得出结论：刚性红细胞表现出不同的流动行为，导致血管壁接触减少（可能改变内皮信号传导和营养输送），并在分叉处呈现不同的分配模式。
key_findings: 红细胞刚性增加显著减少其在血管分叉处的滞留现象。
与预期相反，健康红细胞在部分微循环区域的速度低于刚性化红细胞。
刚性红细胞具有不同的流动行为和分配模式，可能改变内皮信号传导和营养输送。

papers.title: Protein-free membrane fusion: A refined view of the delicate fusogenic properties of calcium.
papers.abstract: In the late 20th century, calcium took on the identity of an independent fusogen, when it was found to induce fusion of anionic large unilamellar vesicles (LUVs), yet its ability to drive fusion in cell-sized membranes remains poorly understood. Here, we directly quantify calcium-mediated fusion of giant unilamellar vesicles (GUVs) using a microfluidic trapping platform combined with confocal microscopy, enabling simultaneous measurement of lipid mixing, content mixing, and fusion outcomes across hundreds of single vesicles. We systematically map fusion efficiency as a function of calcium concentration, membrane composition, and mechanically imposed tension. We find that calcium-induced fusion of GUVs in the absence of proteins is remarkably fickle and composition sensitive, as the vesicles need to be sufficiently unstable to allow the opening of the fusion pore, yet stable enough to prevent bursting and collapse. Negatively charged GUVs containing high fractions of DOPE exhibit the highest fusogenic responsiveness, whereas other compositions undergo extensive lipid mixing without pore formation. Increasing membrane tension can shift this balance and promote full fusion, revealing a narrow parameter space in which calcium acts as an effective protein-free fusogen for cell-sized membranes. These findings clarify long-standing discrepancies between LUV- and GUV-based calcium fusion assays and provide quantitative design rules for employing calcium as a fusogen in synthetic biology and membrane-reconstitution studies, where controlled membrane growth, vesicle-vesicle fusion, and module integration are central to building and sustaining artificial cells.
papers.abstract_zh: 20世纪末，当发现钙离子可诱导阴离子大单层囊泡（large unilamellar vesicles, LUVs）融合时，钙被赋予了独立促融合剂（fusogen）的身份，但其驱动细胞尺度膜融合的能力仍知之甚少。本研究利用微流控捕获平台结合共聚焦显微镜，直接定量测定钙离子介导的巨型单层囊泡（giant unilamellar vesicles, GUVs）融合，实现了对数百个单囊泡的脂质混合、内容物混合及融合结局的同步测量。我们系统绘制了融合效率随钙离子浓度、膜组成及机械张力变化的图谱。研究发现，无蛋白质条件下钙离子诱导的 GUVs 融合具有显著的易变性和组成敏感性：囊泡需足够不稳定以允许融合孔开放，同时又需足够稳定以防止破裂和塌陷。含高比例 DOPE（二油酰磷脂酰乙醇胺）的负电荷 GUVs 表现出最强的促融合响应性，而其他组成仅发生广泛脂质混合而无孔形成。增加膜张力可改变这一平衡并促进完全融合，揭示了钙离子作为细胞尺度膜有效无蛋白质促融合剂的狭窄参数空间。这些发现澄清了基于 LUV 和 GUV 的钙融合测定之间长期存在的差异，并为在合成生物学和膜重组研究中应用钙作为促融合剂提供了定量设计规则——在这些研究中，受控膜生长、囊泡-囊泡融合及模块整合是构建和维持人工细胞的核心。
key_findings: 利用微流控平台定量测定钙离子介导的巨型单层囊泡（GUVs）融合效率，同步监测脂质混合、内容物混合及融合结局。
钙离子诱导的蛋白质无关融合高度敏感且依赖膜组成：高 DOPE 含量的负电荷囊泡最易形成融合孔，其他组成仅发生脂质混合。
增加膜张力可促进完全融合，揭示了钙离子作为有效无蛋白质促融合剂（fusogen）的狭窄参数空间及定量设计规则。

papers.title: Computational rheometry for modeling viscoelasticity and mechanical responses of biomolecular condensates.
papers.abstract: Biomolecular condensates are viscoelastic materials that display composition-specific rheological properties and responses to mechanical forces. For condensates formed by intrinsically disordered proteins and multivalent nucleic acids, structures from coarse-grained simulations have been used in graph-based descriptions of internal, mesoscale structures to extract viscoelastic moduli using a generalized Rouse model. This model rests on the use of eigenvalues of graph Laplacians that are derived from computed, condensate-specific graphs. Here, we introduce the formalism of computational rheometry to enable mechanistic understanding of material properties by bridging the molecular and continuum scales. In computational rheometry, condensates are described as graphs, and each node in the graph is a Maxwell element coupled to a Stokes fluid, thus generating a network of Stokes-Maxwell elements. We describe the formalism and its adaptation to model mechanical responses of graphs derived from coarse-grained simulations of condensates. Using small amplitude oscillatory shear tests, we reproduce the full spectrum of frequency-dependent responses that have been reported for condensates probed using passive microrheology. Computational rheometry also allows for the simulation of different forms of creep tests. We adapt and deploy these creep tests, and the results are discussed in the context of recent experiments. Overall, our work establishes computational rheometry as a route to bridge disparate length and timescales to assess how molecular-scale interactions and dynamics give rise to viscoelastic responses on the mesoscale.
papers.abstract_zh: 生物分子凝聚体是一类粘弹性材料，表现出组分特异性的流变学特性及对外部机械力的响应。对于由内在无序蛋白（intrinsically disordered proteins）和多价核酸形成的凝聚体，研究者们曾利用粗粒化模拟（coarse-grained simulations）得到的结构，通过基于图的介观内部结构描述，结合广义Rouse模型提取粘弹性模数。该模型依赖于从计算获得的凝聚体特异性图中导出图拉普拉斯（graph Laplacian）的特征值。本文引入了"计算流变学"（computational rheometry）的理论框架，通过桥接分子尺度与连续介质尺度，实现对材料特性的机制性理解。在计算流变学中，凝聚体被表征为网络图，其中每个节点代表一个与Stokes流体耦合的Maxwell单元，从而构建出Stokes-Maxwell单元网络。本文阐述了该理论框架及其在模拟粗粒化模拟所得凝聚体图的力学响应中的应用。通过小振幅振荡剪切测试，我们成功重现了被动微流变学（passive microrheology）探测报道的凝聚体频率依赖性响应全谱。计算流变学还可用于模拟不同形式的蠕变测试（creep tests）。我们调整并实施了这些蠕变测试，其结果在近期实验背景下进行了讨论。总体而言，本研究确立了计算流变学作为桥接不同长度与时间尺度的方法，用以评估分子尺度相互作用与动力学如何引发介观尺度的粘弹性响应。
key_findings: 建立了计算流变学框架，将凝聚体建模为Stokes-Maxwell单元网络，桥接分子与连续介质尺度
通过小振幅振荡剪切测试重现了凝聚体全频谱粘弹性响应，与被动微流变实验结果一致
实现了多种蠕变测试模拟，揭示分子相互作用如何产生介观尺度粘弹性响应的计算方法

papers.title: Disruption of nuclear-cytoskeletal connection impairs epithelial cell mechanosensing and collective migration.
papers.abstract: The linker of nucleoskeleton and cytoskeleton (LINC) complex mediates physical communication between the cytoskeleton to the nucleus, thereby influencing nuclear positioning, transcriptional responses, and cell migration. Although prior studies have examined LINC's role in single-cell migration, its impact on collective migration of epithelial cells on surfaces of varying stiffness remains unclear. Here, we disrupted LINC function in MCF10A mammary epithelial cells using an inducible dominant-negative SUN1 construct (SUN1L) that sequesters nesprins. We found that MCF10A mammary epithelial cells with SUN1L expression were slower than wild-type controls on collagen-coated polyacrylamide hydrogels of 0.1-, 5-, and 50-kPa stiffness. Although migration speed of both control and SUN1L cells increased on stiffer substrates, the SUN1L cells displayed lower stiffness sensitivity, indicating impaired mechanosensing after LINC disruption. LINC disruption also altered cell and tissue-scale mechanics: SUN1L cells were smaller, softer, and formed denser epithelial sheets. Alongside these physical changes, LINC-disrupted cells showed stronger cell-matrix adhesions and reduced actomyosin contractility. Cytoskeletal perturbations further revealed that SUN1L cells are less reliant on actomyosin activity for sustained migration. These findings highlight how nuclear-cytoskeletal decoupling triggers multiscale physical changes-cell softening, crowding, and altered adhesion dynamics-that collectively impair mechanosensitive migration. Given LINC's implication in laminopathies and cancer, our results provide new insight into how its dysfunction may influence disease progression and collective cell behavior.
papers.abstract_zh: 核骨架与细胞骨架连接物（LINC）复合物介导细胞骨架与细胞核之间的物理通讯，从而影响细胞核定位、转录反应和细胞迁移。尽管先前研究已探讨LINC在单细胞迁移中的作用，但其对上皮细胞在不同硬度表面上集体迁移的影响仍不清楚。本研究利用可诱导的显性负性SUN1构建体（SUN1L）隔离nesprins，从而破坏MCF10A乳腺上皮细胞中的LINC功能。结果发现，在涂覆胶原蛋白的0.1、5和50 kPa聚丙烯酰胺水凝胶上，表达SUN1L的MCF10A细胞比野生型对照组迁移更慢。虽然对照组和SUN1L细胞的迁移速度在较硬基质上均有所增加，但SUN1L细胞表现出较低的硬度敏感性，表明LINC破坏后机械感应受损。LINC破坏还改变了细胞和组织尺度的力学特性：SUN1L细胞更小、更软，并形成更致密的上皮片层。伴随这些物理变化，LINC破坏的细胞显示出更强的细胞-基质粘附和降低的肌动蛋白-肌球蛋白（actomyosin）收缩性。细胞骨架扰动进一步揭示SUN1L细胞对actomyosin活性的依赖性降低。这些发现强调了核-细胞骨架解耦如何触发多尺度物理变化——细胞软化、拥挤和粘附动力学改变——从而共同损害机械敏感性迁移。鉴于LINC与层蛋白病（laminopathies）和癌症的关联，本研究为其功能障碍如何影响疾病进展和集体细胞行为提供了新见解。
key_findings: LINC复合物功能破坏显著降低乳腺上皮细胞在不同硬度基质上的迁移速度并削弱其机械敏感性。
核-细胞骨架解耦导致细胞软化、体积缩小、上皮片层致密化及细胞-基质粘附增强等多尺度物理改变。
LINC破坏降低细胞对肌动蛋白-肌球蛋白收缩力的依赖性，改变细胞迁移的力学调控机制。

papers.title: Domain interactions in neuronal nitric oxide synthase identified by time-resolved fluorescence.
papers.abstract: Nitric oxide synthase (NOS) catalyzes the formation of nitric oxide through the transfer of electrons from FAD to FMN in the reductase domain of the enzyme and then from FMN to a heme in the oxygenase domain of the partner enzyme in a homodimeric complex. The calcium-signaling protein calmodulin (CaM) binds to a CaM-binding domain located between the reductase and oxygenase domains to enable efficient NOS activity. Directed electron transfer in NOS occurs through the formation of conformational states of the enzyme that sequentially place electron donor and acceptor domains nearby, suggesting that the electron transfers are conformationally gated. We used fluorescence-labeled CaM and time-resolved fluorescence detection to reveal the presence of multiple conformational states of NOS. The efficiency of FRET from a fluorophore attached to CaM to the heme groups of the enzyme depends on the conformational state of the enzyme. Analysis of fluorescence decays for a series of site-directed mutants of NOS and CaM allowed us to assign fluorescence quenching states to conformational states of the enzyme. We used mutations expected to disrupt specific interactions between enzyme domains of NOS or between CaM and NOS, consistent with their known effects on enzyme kinetics. The results suggest the presence of a conformational state in which the FAD and FMN subdomains are in close proximity, one or more in which the FMN subdomain interacts with the oxygenase domain in the partner enzyme, and multiple conformation states in which CaM is in close proximity to one of the oxygenase domains. We suggest that CaM docking to the oxygenase domain facilitates the productive interaction of the FMN domain with the oxygenase domain in its dimeric partner. Such a conformation would enable electron transfer from FMN to the heme of the dimeric partner.
papers.abstract_zh: 神经元型一氧化氮合酶（NOS）通过还原酶域中FAD向FMN的电子传递，以及随后FMN向同源二聚体伙伴酶加氧酶域血红素的电子传递，催化一氧化氮生成。钙信号蛋白钙调蛋白（CaM）结合于还原酶域与加氧酶域之间的CaM结合域以激活NOS。NOS的定向电子传递通过形成使电子供受体域依次靠近的构象状态实现，表明该过程受构象门控。本研究利用荧光标记的CaM和时间分辨荧光检测，揭示了NOS存在多种构象状态。连接于CaM的荧光团向酶血红素基团的FRET（荧光共振能量转移）效率取决于酶的构象状态。通过对NOS和CaM定点突变体的荧光衰减分析，我们将荧光猝灭状态归因于特定构象状态。结果表明存在FAD与FMN亚域靠近的构象、FMN亚域与伙伴酶加氧酶域互作的构象，以及CaM与加氧酶域靠近的多种状态。CaM与加氧酶域的对接可促进FMN域与其二聚体伙伴的有效互作，从而实现从FMN向伙伴酶血红素的电子传递。
key_findings: 利用时间分辨荧光FRET技术揭示了神经元型一氧化氮合酶（nNOS）存在多种构象状态
鉴定出FAD-FMN亚域靠近及FMN与伙伴酶加氧酶域互作的特定功能构象
发现钙调蛋白（CaM）与加氧酶域对接可促进FMN域向二聚体伙伴血红素的电子传递

papers.title: Asymmetry-induced transient gel formation in fluid lipid membranes.
papers.abstract: Compositional asymmetry is a defining feature of cellular membranes, controlling permeability, protein activity, cholesterol dynamics, and shape remodeling. This asymmetry can create a stress imbalance, with the two leaflets experiencing opposing tensions, though direct experimental measurement of leaflet stress remains challenging. Such a stress imbalance can compress one leaflet and trigger a fluid-to-gel phase transition, which reduces membrane fluidity and markedly increases bending rigidity. These phenomena raise a key question of how membranes respond mechanically before crossing the transition threshold, a regime that remains relevant to biological functions. Here, we combine comprehensive all-atom and coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations to examine how stress asymmetry modulates membrane structure and mechanics near the transition point. Using POPE and DLPC bilayers as model systems, we find that moderate asymmetry induces transient gel-like domains that continuously form and dissolve, amplifying undulations and lowering bilayer rigidity. Beyond the gelation threshold, the trend reverses and the bilayer stiffens, resulting in a nonmonotonic dependence of rigidity on asymmetry. Moreover, our results reveal distinct curvature preferences of fluid and gel phases. Extending this analysis to a multicomponent bacterial outer membrane, we demonstrate that stress asymmetry can trigger transient gel-like domain formation even in complex lipid mixtures. This provides a proof of principle that differential stress modulates membrane mechanics by inducing either softening or stiffening, complementing the effects of molecular composition. Our findings elucidate how cells might exploit the stress-curvature-phase coupling to tune membrane rigidity under near-physiological conditions.
papers.abstract_zh: 组成不对称性是细胞膜的决定性特征，控制着膜渗透性、蛋白质活性、胆固醇动态及形状重塑。这种不对称性可产生应力失衡，使两个单层（leaflets）经历相反张力，尽管单层应力的直接实验测量仍具挑战性。这种应力失衡可压缩某一单层并触发流体-凝胶相变，从而降低膜流动性并显著增加弯曲刚性。这些现象引出一个关键问题：在跨越转变阈值之前膜如何机械响应，这一状态范围仍与生物功能密切相关。在此，我们结合全面的全原子（all-atom）和粗粒化（coarse-grained）分子动力学模拟，研究应力不对称如何调节接近转变点的膜结构和力学。以POPE和DLPC双层作为模型系统，我们发现适度不对称诱导瞬态凝胶样结构域持续形成和溶解，放大波动并降低双层刚性。超过凝胶化阈值后，趋势逆转且双层变硬，导致刚性对不对称性呈非单调依赖。此外，我们的结果揭示流体相和凝胶相具有不同的曲率偏好。将此分析扩展到多组分细菌外膜，我们证明应力不对称即使在复杂脂质混合物中也能触发瞬态凝胶样结构域形成。这为差异应力通过诱导软化或硬化来调节膜力学提供了原理验证，补充了分子组成的影响。我们的发现阐明了细胞如何利用应力-曲率-相耦合在近生理条件下调节膜刚性。
key_findings: 适度不对称诱导瞬态凝胶样结构域持续形成与溶解，降低膜弯曲刚性并放大波动
膜刚性随不对称性呈非单调依赖：超过凝胶化阈值后由软化转为硬化
在多组分细菌外膜中证实应力不对称可触发瞬态凝胶域，验证该机制的普适性

papers.title: Nonuniform filament turnover, contractility, and bundle formation in disordered actomyosin networks.
papers.abstract: We use mathematical modeling and simulation to investigate how filament turnover and mechanics influence contractility and bundle formation in disordered actomyosin networks. Using a two-dimensional agent-based model for an actomyosin network, we investigate four simplified models for filament turnover: uniform, biased, branching, and treadmilling. With no turnover, over time contractility decreases and bundle formation increases, and networks eventually form stationary patterns that cannot contract. Introducing turnover allows contractility to persist longer compared with the no-turnover scenario. Uniform turnover, where new filaments have random positions and orientations, disrupts bundle formation and enables persistent contractility. In biased turnover, branching, and treadmilling, the positions and orientations of new filaments depend on the existing network. These nonuniform turnover models increase bundle formation compared with uniform turnover, while still allowing long-term contractility. Branching at 70° disrupts bundle formation to enable prolonged contractility, whereas filament treadmilling disrupts the trade-off between bundle formation and contractility. Biased turnover places new filaments near existing ones, which promotes bundle formation but is less effective at maintaining contractility. Simulations showed that more bendable filaments accelerate bundle formation, while higher effective cross-linking friction enhances contractility. Our results suggest that cells can tune contractility and bundle formation in disordered actomyosin networks by varying actin turnover pathways.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们利用数学建模与模拟研究了丝状体周转（filament turnover）及力学特性如何影响无序肌动蛋白-肌球蛋白（actomyosin）网络中的收缩性（contractility）与束形成（bundle formation）。通过建立二维基于智能体（agent-based）的肌动蛋白-肌球蛋白网络模型，我们探究了四种简化的丝状体周转模式：均匀周转、偏置周转、分支（branching）和踏车（treadmilling）。在无周转条件下，随着时间推移，网络收缩性降低而束形成增加，最终形成无法收缩的静止模式。引入周转机制可使收缩性较无周转情形维持更久。均匀周转（新丝状体具有随机位置和方向）破坏束形成并实现持续收缩。在偏置周转、分支和踏车模型中，新丝状体的位置和方向依赖于现有网络结构。这些非均匀周转模型较均匀周转增加束形成，同时仍允许长期收缩。70°分支破坏束形成以实现长期收缩，而丝状体踏车运动打破束形成与收缩性之间的权衡。偏置周转将新丝状体置于现有丝状体附近，促进束形成但在维持收缩性方面效果较差。模拟显示，更易弯曲的丝状体加速束形成，而更高的有效交联摩擦（cross-linking friction）增强收缩性。我们的结果表明，细胞可通过调节肌动蛋白周转途径来调控无序肌动蛋白-肌球蛋白网络中的收缩性与束形成。
key_findings: 非均匀周转模式在维持网络收缩性的同时促进束形成，打破束形成与收缩性的传统权衡。
70°分支通过破坏束形成延长收缩时间，踏车运动打破束形成与收缩性之间的权衡。
丝状体可弯曲性加速束形成，而交联摩擦增强收缩性，为细胞力学调控提供独立物理参数。

papers.title: Phased fragility and stability of non-genetic B cell states in the germinal center accelerate the genetic evolution of antibodies.
papers.abstract: Vaccine responses depend on the Darwinian genetic evolution of B cells to generate high-affinity antibodies. However, B cells gain non-genetic heterogeneity while searching for antigen and T helper cells, but then their non-genetic cell states remain stable within proliferative clonal bursts. We explored the functional consequence of this dynamic control of non-genetic variability by developing a mathematical model, integrating a wealth of immunological knowledge. We discovered that variability in B cell fate decisions does not impair but instead accelerates affinity maturation by allowing high-affinity outliers to escape plasma cell differentiation and seed further rounds of Darwinian evolution. During clonal bursts, non-genetic cell state stability further promotes their amplification. The resulting model correctly predicts emergent vaccine response properties in mouse strains with altered B cell fate decision profiles. Our work reconciles classical B cell clonal selection theory with the experimentally observed non-genetic variability, and it provides an interpretable knowledge-based modeling framework to support personalized vaccination strategies.
papers.abstract_zh: 疫苗反应依赖于B细胞的达尔文式遗传演化以产生高亲和力抗体。然而，B细胞在搜寻抗原和T辅助细胞（T helper cells）过程中获得非遗传异质性，但在增殖性克隆扩增（clonal bursts）期间其非遗传细胞状态保持稳定。我们通过整合大量免疫学知识构建数学模型，探索了这种非遗传变异性动态调控的功能意义。研究发现，B细胞命运决定的变异性非但不损害，反而通过允许高亲和力离群细胞（outliers）逃逸浆细胞分化并启动新一轮达尔文演化，从而加速亲和力成熟。在克隆扩增期间，非遗传细胞状态的稳定性进一步促进这些细胞的扩增。所得模型正确预测了B细胞命运决定特征改变的小鼠品系中涌现的疫苗反应特性。本研究调和了经典B细胞克隆选择理论与实验观察到的非遗传变异性，并为支持个性化疫苗策略提供了可解释的知识驱动建模框架。
key_findings: B细胞命运决定的变异性非但不损害，反而通过允许高亲和力离群细胞逃逸浆细胞分化以启动新一轮达尔文演化，从而加速亲和力成熟
克隆扩增期间非遗传细胞状态的稳定性促进高亲和力离群细胞的进一步放大
该知识驱动的数学模型成功预测不同B细胞命运决定特征的小鼠品系中的疫苗反应特性，为个性化疫苗策略提供可解释框架

papers.title: Systematic discovery of pro- and anti-HIV host factors in primary human CD4+ T cells.
papers.abstract: Host factors that promote or restrict human immunodeficiency virus (HIV) infection in human CD4+ T cells have not been comprehensively identified. We employed orthogonal genome-wide CRISPR activation (CRISPRa) and CRISPR knockout screens in primary CD4+ T cells to discover pro- and anti-HIV host factors systematically. Secondary pooled screens and individual perturbations validated high-confidence hits and revealed diverse mechanisms of action. CRISPRa uncovered multiple potent antiviral factors, including PI16, PPID, SHISA3, and ITM2A. PI16 interacts with host factors involved in HIV fusion and inhibits viral entry, whereas PPID (Cyp40), a paralog of the proviral cyclophilin CypA, binds capsid and reduces nuclear import of the HIV core. Structural modeling, evolutionary analyses, and targeted mutagenesis revealed domains and residues required for PPID-mediated HIV restriction, including non-human primate ortholog substitutions that enhance antiviral activity. Together, these data define the functional HIV-host interaction landscape in primary human T cells and uncover new mechanisms modulating infection.
papers.abstract_zh: 促进或限制人类免疫缺陷病毒（HIV）感染人类CD4+ T细胞的宿主因子尚未被全面鉴定。本研究利用正交全基因组CRISPR激活（CRISPRa）和CRISPR敲除筛选，在原代CD4+ T细胞中系统发现促HIV和抗HIV宿主因子。二次筛选和单独扰动验证高置信度靶点并揭示多种作用机制。CRISPRa发现多个强效抗病毒因子，包括PI16、PPID、SHISA3和ITM2A。PI16与参与HIV融合的宿主因子相互作用并抑制病毒进入，而PPID（Cyp40，促病毒亲环蛋白CypA的旁系同源物）结合衣壳并减少HIV核心核输入。结构建模、进化分析和靶向诱变揭示了PPID介导HIV限制所需的结构域和残基，包括增强抗病毒活性的非人灵长类直系同源替换。这些数据共同定义了原代人T细胞中的功能性HIV-宿主相互作用图谱，并揭示调控感染的新机制。
key_findings: 利用正交全基因组CRISPRa和CRISPR敲除筛选在原发性CD4+ T细胞中系统鉴定促/抗HIV宿主因子
发现PI16抑制病毒进入，PPID（Cyp40）结合衣壳并阻断HIV核心核输入
揭示PPID限制HIV的结构域、关键残基及非人灵长类增强型变异

papers.title: Photoactivatable CRISPR/Cas13d via upconversion nanoparticles for deep tissue RNA engineering and orthopedic therapy.
papers.abstract: Spatiotemporal control of RNA therapeutics remains a fundamental challenge limiting clinical translation. Here, we develop a photoactivatable CRISPR/Cas13d (paCas13d) system that enables non-invasive, light-controlled RNA manipulation in deep tissues. Through structure-guided engineering, we identify optimal split sites within RfxCas13d and create light-switchable fragments using CRY2PHR/CIBN optogenetic dimerization. To overcome the limited tissue penetration of blue light, we engineer polyethylenimine-functionalized upconversion nanoparticles (UCNPs-PEI) that serve dual roles as gene carriers and photon transducers, converting tissue-penetrating near-infrared (NIR) to blue light. The UCNPs-PEI@paCas13d system achieves precise spatiotemporal control of RNA targeting within bone tissue in vivo. In a murine steroid-associated osteonecrosis model, NIR-activated paCas13d achieves robust TET3 knockdown, disrupting the TET3-5hmC-PTEN axis that drives glucocorticoid-induced osteocyte apoptosis. This targeted intervention prevents bone deterioration, with treated mice showing preserved trabecular architecture, enhanced bone volume, and favorable shifts in bone turnover markers, while maintaining systemic glucocorticoid efficacy. Our platform combines the programmability of CRISPR/Cas13d with non-invasive optical control, offering a versatile approach for treating diseases requiring localized RNA modulation while minimizing systemic effects.
papers.abstract_zh: 时空控制RNA治疗药物仍是限制临床转化的根本性挑战。本研究开发了光激活CRISPR/Cas13d（paCas13d）系统，可在深部组织中实现无创光控RNA操控。通过结构引导工程，我们在RfxCas13d中确定了最佳分裂位点，并利用CRY2PHR/CIBN光遗传二聚化创建光开关片段。为克服蓝光组织穿透性差的限制，我们设计了聚乙烯亚胺功能化的上转换纳米颗粒（UCNPs-PEI），其兼具基因载体和光子转换器功能，可将具有组织穿透性的近红外光（NIR）转换为蓝光。UCNPs-PEI@paCas13d系统在活体骨组织中实现了RNA靶向的精准时空控制。在类固醇相关骨坏死小鼠模型中，NIR激活的paCas13d有效敲低TET3，阻断了驱动糖皮质激素诱导骨细胞凋亡的TET3-5hmC-PTEN轴。该靶向干预阻止了骨退化，治疗组小鼠显示出保留的骨小梁结构、增强的骨体积及骨转换标志物的有利转变，同时维持系统性糖皮质激素疗效。本研究平台结合CRISPR/Cas13d的可编程性与无创光学控制，为需要局部RNA调控且最小化全身效应的疾病治疗提供了通用策略。
key_findings: 开发光激活CRISPR/Cas13d系统，利用CRY2PHR/CIBN光遗传二聚化实现RNA靶向时空精准控制
设计上转换纳米颗粒(UCNPs-PEI)作为基因载体，将近红外光转换为蓝光以克服组织穿透限制
在骨坏死模型中实现TET3精准敲低，阻断TET3-5hmC-PTEN凋亡轴并恢复骨小梁结构与骨量

papers.title: Multi-omic mapping of Drosophila protein secretomes reveals tissue-specific origins and inter-organ trafficking.
papers.abstract: Secreted proteins regulate many aspects of animal biology and are attractive targets for biomarkers and therapeutics. However, comprehensively identifying the "secretome", along with their tissues of origin, remains extremely challenging. To address this, we employed multiple 'omics methods to define a tissue-secretome map of 535 blood plasma proteins derived from specific cell-types and organs in Drosophila melanogaster. This map was enabled by methodological improvements including a collection of transgenic flies to label endogenous secreted proteins in 10 major tissue types, large-scale blood isolation, whole animal snRNA-seq, and 40 CRISPR knock-in strains. Using this map, we identify features of circulating proteins: most originate from specific tissues including unusual sources (e.g. glia), many are uncharacterized, and some are shed ectodomains of transmembrane proteins. In addition, in vivo experiments revealed circulating proteins with tissue-specific expression, as well as proteins that are deposited in a different tissue from where they are synthesized, suggesting potential inter-organ functions. Our secretome map will serve as a resource to investigate blood protein function, discover candidate tissue-tissue communication signals, and mine for homologues of human biomarkers.
papers.abstract_zh: 分泌蛋白调控动物生物学的诸多方面，是极具吸引力的生物标志物和治疗靶点。然而，全面识别“分泌组”及其组织来源仍极具挑战性。为此，我们采用多种组学方法，绘制了黑腹果蝇（Drosophila melanogaster）535个血浆蛋白的组织-分泌组图谱，这些蛋白来源于特定细胞类型和器官。该图谱的建立得益于方法学改进，包括用于标记10种主要组织类型内源分泌蛋白的转基因果蝇品系集合、大规模血液分离、全动物单核RNA测序（snRNA-seq）以及40个CRISPR敲入品系。利用该图谱，我们鉴定了循环蛋白的特征：大多数源自特定组织，包括非常规来源（如胶质细胞）；许多尚未被表征；部分为跨膜蛋白脱落的胞外域。此外，体内实验揭示了具有组织特异性表达的循环蛋白，以及在其合成组织以外的组织中沉积的蛋白，提示潜在的器官间功能。我们的分泌组图谱将作为研究血液蛋白功能、发现候选组织-组织通讯信号以及挖掘人类生物标志物同源物的资源。
key_findings: 整合多组学方法绘制了535个血浆蛋白的果蝇组织-分泌组图谱，涵盖10种主要组织类型的特异性来源
揭示多数循环蛋白源自特定组织（包括胶质细胞等非常规来源），部分为跨膜蛋白脱落的胞外域
通过体内实验发现蛋白存在器官间转运现象，即某些蛋白在合成组织以外的部位沉积，提示潜在的器官间通讯功能

papers.title: SPNS2 exports sphingosine-1-phosphate and imports glucose.
papers.abstract: Spinster homolog 2 (SPNS2) exports the bioactive sphingolipid metabolite sphingosine-1-phosphate (S1P) out of cells to regulate processes important for health and diseases. However, the molecular mechanism underlying SPNS2 transport functions and its precise physiological roles are not fully understood. Here, through a series of complementary approaches in mice, cellular assays, and particularly with in vitro cell-free binding and transport assays, we show that SPNS2 has antiporter-like activity, transporting S1P out of cells and glucose in. We demonstrate that SPNS2 directly binds glucose and transports it and identify key amino acid residues of SPNS2 involved in glucose engagement and import. Our data reveal that S1P, which enters from the cytosolic side of SPNS2 facilitates conformational changes, enabling extracellular glucose to move inward through the central cavity. Thus, we identify a mechanism that dynamically contributes to glucose homeostasis in response to metabolic and sphingolipid cues with clinical and pathophysiological implications.
papers.abstract_zh: Spinster同源蛋白2（SPNS2）将具有生物活性的鞘脂代谢物鞘氨醇-1-磷酸（S1P）输出细胞，以调控与健康和疾病相关的重要生理过程。然而，SPNS2转运功能的分子机制及其精确的生理作用尚未完全阐明。本研究通过小鼠模型、细胞实验以及特别是体外无细胞结合与转运实验等一系列互补方法，证明SPNS2具有反向转运蛋白（antiporter）样活性，可将S1P输出细胞并输入葡萄糖。我们证实SPNS2直接结合并转运葡萄糖，并鉴定了SPNS2中参与葡萄糖结合和导入的关键氨基酸残基。研究数据表明，从SPNS2细胞质侧进入的S1P促进构象变化，使细胞外葡萄糖能够通过中央腔向内移动。因此，我们揭示了一种动态响应代谢和鞘脂信号、参与葡萄糖稳态调控的机制，具有临床和病理生理学意义。
key_findings: 揭示SPNS2作为反向转运蛋白同时输出S1P并输入葡萄糖的双重功能
鉴定SPNS2参与葡萄糖结合与转运的关键氨基酸残基
阐明S1P结合诱导构象变化促进葡萄糖跨膜转运的分子机制

papers.title: Disruption of the SAGA CORE triggers collateral degradation of KAT2A.
papers.abstract: The Spt-Ada-Gcn5 acetyltransferase (SAGA) complex regulates gene expression through histone acetylation at promoters, mediated by its histone acetyl transferase (HAT), KAT2A. While SAGA structure and function are well characterised, mechanisms controlling the stability of individual subunits, including KAT2A, remain unclear. Here, using a fluorescence-based KAT2A stability reporter, we systematically dissect the molecular dependencies controlling KAT2A protein abundance, and identify the non-enzymatic SAGA CORE module subunits-TADA1, TAF5L, and TAF6L- as necessary for KAT2A stability. Loss of these subunits disrupts SAGA complex integrity, leading to non-chromatin-bound KAT2A that is degraded by the proteasome and consequent reduced H3K9 acetylation. Proteomic profiling reveals progressive loss of components from the CORE and HAT modules upon acute SAGA CORE disruption, indicating that an intact CORE is required for the stability of numerous SAGA components. Finally, a focused CRISPR screen of ubiquitin-proteasome system genes identifies the E3 ligase UBR5, a known regulator of orphan protein degradation, and the deubiquitinase OTUD5, as regulators of KAT2A degradation when the SAGA CORE is perturbed. Together, these findings reveal a dependency of KAT2A protein stability on SAGA CORE integrity and define an orphan quality control mechanism targeting unassembled KAT2A, revealing a potential vulnerability in SAGA-driven malignancies.
papers.abstract_zh: Spt-Ada-Gcn5乙酰转移酶（SAGA）复合体通过其组蛋白乙酰转移酶（HAT）KAT2A介导的启动子组蛋白乙酰化来调控基因表达。尽管SAGA的结构和功能已被充分阐明，但调控各亚基（包括KAT2A）稳定性的机制仍不清楚。本研究利用基于荧光的KAT2A稳定性报告系统，系统解析了调控KAT2A蛋白丰度的分子依赖性，发现非酶促的SAGA CORE模块亚基——TADA1、TAF5L和TAF6L——对KAT2A的稳定性至关重要。这些亚基的缺失会破坏SAGA复合体完整性，导致KAT2A脱离染色质并被蛋白酶体降解，进而降低H3K9乙酰化水平。蛋白质组学分析显示，急性破坏SAGA CORE会导致CORE和HAT模块组分逐步丢失，表明完整的CORE对众多SAGA组分的稳定性是必需的。最后，针对泛素-蛋白酶体系统基因的CRISPR筛选鉴定出E3连接酶UBR5（已知孤儿蛋白降解调控因子）和去泛素化酶OTUD5，在SAGA CORE受损时调控KAT2A的降解。这些发现共同揭示了KAT2A蛋白稳定性依赖于SAGA CORE的完整性，并定义了针对未组装KAT2A的孤儿蛋白质量控制机制，为SAGA驱动的恶性肿瘤提供了潜在的治疗靶点。
key_findings: 非酶促SAGA CORE亚基TADA1、TAF5L和TAF6L是维持KAT2A稳定性的关键因子
CORE模块破坏导致SAGA复合体完整性丧失及游离KAT2A的蛋白酶体降解
E3连接酶UBR5与去泛素化酶OTUD5协同调控孤儿KAT2A的降解过程

papers.title: A standardized workflow for kinetic metabolic model curation and dissemination.
papers.abstract: Kinetic metabolic models provide invaluable insights into cellular metabolism, supporting applications in synthetic biology, metabolic engineering, and systems biology. However, reproducibility and utility of these models hinge on clear and rigorous documentation, standardized annotation, and accessible visualization. This paper presents a workflow for building, annotating, visualizing, and sharing kinetic metabolic models. Our method integrates community standards and open-source tools to ensure reproducibility, interoperability, and user accessibility. This procedure enables researchers to produce reusable and well-documented kinetic models, advancing their role as powerful tools in metabolic research.
papers.abstract_zh: 动力学代谢模型为细胞代谢提供了宝贵的见解，支持合成生物学、代谢工程和系统生物学等领域的应用。然而，这些模型的可重复性和实用性依赖于清晰严谨的文档记录、标准化的注释以及可及的可视化。本文提出了一个用于构建、注释、可视化和共享动力学代谢模型的标准化流程。该方法整合社区标准与开源工具，确保可重复性、互操作性和用户可及性。该流程使研究人员能够产出可重用且文档完善的动力学模型，推动其成为代谢研究中的有力工具。
key_findings: 建立了涵盖构建、注释、可视化及共享的动力学代谢模型标准化整理流程。
整合社区标准与开源工具，系统性地保障模型的可重复性与互操作性。
显著提升了动力学代谢模型的可重用性与文档质量，强化其在代谢研究中的应用价值。

papers.title: How individual vigor shapes human-human physical interaction.
papers.abstract: The speed of voluntary movements varies systematically, with some individuals moving consistently faster than others across different actions. These variations, conceptualized as vigor, reflect a time-effort-accuracy tradeoff in motor planning. How do two mechanically coupled partners with different individual vigors collaborate, e.g. to move a table together? Here, we show that such dyads coordinate goal-directed movements with minimal interaction force, exhibiting a dyadic vigor with similar characteristics as individual vigor. The emerging dyadic motor plan is strongly influenced by the slower partner, whose vigor predicts dyadic vigor, with effects lasting beyond practice. Computational modeling with stochastic optimal control reveals the critical role of partners' movement timing uncertainty and vigor in shaping coordination, allowing us to predict dyadic movements from individual behavior across diverse conditions. These findings shed light on the mechanisms underlying human collaboration and may be used in applications ranging from physical training and rehabilitation to collaborative robotics for manufacturing.
papers.abstract_zh: 自主运动的速度存在系统性差异，某些个体在不同动作中始终比他人更快。这些被概念化为活力（vigor）的变异反映了运动规划中的时间-努力-准确性权衡。两个具有不同个体活力的机械耦合伙伴如何协作，例如共同移动桌子？本研究表明，此类二人组以最小交互力协调目标导向动作，表现出具有个体活力相似特征的二元活力（dyadic vigor）。涌现的二元运动计划受较慢伙伴的强烈影响，其活力可预测二元活力，且该效应持续超越练习阶段。基于随机最优控制（stochastic optimal control）的计算建模揭示了伙伴动作时间不确定性与活力在塑造协调中的关键作用，使我们能够跨多种条件从个体行为预测二元动作。这些发现阐明了人类协作的潜在机制，可应用于物理训练、康复及制造业协作机器人等领域。
key_findings: 机械耦合的二人组以最小交互力协调目标导向动作，涌现的二元活力具有个体活力相似特征
较慢伙伴的活力主导二元运动计划形成，其预测效应持久存在且不因练习而减弱
随机最优控制模型揭示伙伴动作时间不确定性与活力对协调的塑造机制，实现跨条件预测
